1000633826.english: No, actually... Actually, everyone was happy, right?

1000633827.english: No... no... everyone liked it here better than outside.
1000633827.korean: 아냐... 아냐... 모두 바깥보다 이곳을 더 좋아해 줬어요.

1000633829.english: Mery, did I make them unhappy...?
1000633829.korean: 메리, 제가 그녀들을 불행하게 한 걸까요...?

1000633830.english: Yes. But at the same time, it made me happy. And the one who was the most unhappy was you, Machina.
1000633830.korean: 응. 그렇지만, 동시에 행복하게 해주었어. 그리고 그중에서 가장 불행했던 건 너였어, 마키나.

1000633832.english: I... I... What should I do...

1000633835.english: - Yes, as the last human, I had to rebuild human society with them.
1000633835.korean: - 그래, 나는 최후의 인간으로서 그녀들과 인류사회를 재건해야만 했다.

1000633836.english: But, other than humans, there are only Bioroids outside...

1000633838.english: - Yeah, Arsenal. She used to say that. She said someone would keep fighting me.
1000633838.korean: - 그래, 아스널 그녀가 말했었다. 끊임없는 인간이 나와 싸울 것 이라고.

1000633839.english: - To accomplish that heavy task, I had to go outside.
1000633839.korean: - 그 무거운 대업을 이루기 위해선 바깥에 나가야 했다.

1000633840.english: ... ... I see. But if you want it here too...

1000633842.english: Are you talking about that place where there are only ruins outside because of the Metal Parasites, and where Bioroids form factions?
1000633842.korean: 바깥에는 철충들 때문에 폐허밖에 없고, 바이오로이드끼리 파벌을 이루는 그곳을 말씀하시는 건가요?

1000633843.english: Haha... But, rebuilding humanity... That's a desire I can't grant.
1000633843.korean: 후후... 그렇지만, 인류를 재건해야 한다니... 그건 제가 들어드릴 수 없는 욕망이군요..

1000633844.english: Should I say the same thing...?

1000633846.english: I said I'd save everyone. There are still Bioroids in the world who need help.
1000633846.korean: 모두를 구하겠다고 했잖아. 아직 세상엔 도움이 필요한 바이오로이드들이 있어.

1000633847.english: Let's go save them. This time, let's do it together.

1000633849.english: But it's too late. As you know, I'm not fit enough to go to paradise.
1000633849.korean: 그렇지만 이미 늦었군요. 아시다시피 저는 낙원에 나가지 못하는 몸이에요.

1000633850.english: What? Is there no other way?

1000633851.english: Please let me disappear with paradise... and the sins I have committed against everyone will never be forgiven.
1000633851.korean: 저는 낙원과 함께 사라지게 해주세요... 게다가 제가 모두에게 저지른 죄는 용서받지 못 할 거에요.

1000633852.english: No, Machina! Now... Now I can finally meet you...
1000633852.korean: 안 돼, 마키나! 이제야... 이제야 너와 만날 수 있게 되었는데...

1000633853.english: Mery, can I ask you something?

1000633854.english: Why were you so desperate to save me? Was it simply because of Anne's will?
1000633854.korean: 왜 그토록 저를 구하려고 했었나요? 단순히 앤의 유언... 때문이었을까요?

1000633855.english: Machina tried to save everyone, but there was no one to save Machina... and,
1000633855.korean: 마키나는 모두를 구하려 했지만 정작 마키나를 구해줄 사람이 없었으니까... 그리고,

1000633856.english: Because Machina is the only family I have left...

1000633858.english: I'm sorry I couldn't save you, Mery.

1000633859.english: - Machina seems to think she can’t leave this world, but Orkahoen had Dr. and Scathy, who possessed the sharpest minds there.
1000633859.korean: - 마키나는 이 세계에서 나가지 못한다고 생각하는 듯 하지만, 오르카호엔 최고의 두뇌를 가진 닥터와 스카디가 있었다.

1000633861.english: - This is nothing compared to when I ran away from Lemonade in the VR world.
1000633861.korean: - VR세계에서 레모네이드에게 도망쳤을 때에 비하면 이 정도는 아무것도 아닐것이다.

1000633862.english: What are you talking about? Human? Human?!

1000633868.english: I have a reason to go out.
1000633868.korean: 내겐 바깥으로 나가야 할 이유가 있어.

1000633870.english: Because the happiness here is fake.

1000633871.english: We must go and rebuild human society.

1000633872.english: No, the only thing that remains is the fact that you are happy.
1000633872.korean: 아니, 그건 행복하다는 사실만이 남을 뿐이야.

1000633873.english: Machina, why are you inviting people here?
1000633873.korean: 마키나, 너는 왜 이곳에 사람들을 초대하는거지?

1000633874.english: If you were alone in paradise, you would see the same scenery.
1000633874.korean: 너 혼자 낙원에 있다면 똑같은 풍경을 볼 텐데 말이야.

1000633875.english: That's right. Nothing really happens here.
1000633875.korean: 맞아. 이곳에선 실제로 아무 일도 일어나질 않아.

1000633876.english: We didn't choose our happiness here.

1000633883.english: The world hasn't fallen apart yet.

1000633888.english: Paradise collapsed and I was left alone in that space, thinking about many things.
1000633888.korean: 낙원이 무너지고 그 공간에 홀로 남아 여러가지 생각을 하였어요.

1000633889.english: From the past to the present, only sadness and regret lingered in my mind. Then, suddenly, a question arose.
1000633889.korean: 과거부터 현재까지 슬픔과 후회만이 머릿속을 맴돌았죠. 그러다 문득, 의문이 생겼어요.

1000633890.english: Why did you save me, human?

1000633891.english: - If there's a reason I saved her, it's obviously...

1000633892.english: - I felt compassion for her, who had fought alone to save others in a world that had fallen into ruin.
1000633892.korean: - 홀로 멸망한 세계에서 다른 이들을 구원하기 위해 홀로 싸워온 그녀에게 나는 연민을 느꼈었다.

1000633894.english: It may not be logical, but it is the most human emotion.

1000633895.english: No, it's just that it's similar to the reason I created Paradise.
1000633895.korean: 아니요. 그저, 제가 낙원을 만든 이유와 비슷해서 말이에요.

1000633896.english: - Because we needed her help to rebuild humanity.
1000633896.korean: - 인류를 재건하기 위해 그녀의 도움이 필요했으니까.

1000633899.english: Well then, I guess I should help you in both material and spiritual ways.

1000633900.english: - Paradise used Bismarck's machine, but the technology that made the ruins look like a city with holograms was probably her ability.
1000633900.korean: - 낙원은 비스마르크의 기계를 사용하였지만, 홀로그램으로 폐허를 도시처럼 보이게 했던 그 기술만은 그녀의 능력일 것이다.

1000633901.english: - Then, that technology will definitely be of great help in the future fight against the Metal Parasites.
1000633901.korean: - 그렇다면 그 기술은 분명 앞으로 철충과의 싸움에 큰 도움이 되겠지.

1000633902.english: I see, we can't be at ease as long as there are Metal Parasites.
1000633902.korean: 그렇군요, 철충들이 있는이상 안심하고 있을 수는 없죠.

1000633903.english: My abilities are insignificant, but if you need me, please use me.
1000633903.korean: 보잘것없는 능력이지만, 필요하시다면 저를 사용해 주세요.

1000633907.english: Because I have to fight the Metal Parasites.

1000633909.english: Paradise is not something else, but a place where there is a savior.
1000633909.korean: 낙원은 다른 무언가가 아닌 구세주가 있는 곳이 낙원이겠죠.

1000633910.english: So I'm going to try to find a way to make everyone happy here.
1000633910.korean: 그러니 이곳에서 모두를 행복하게 해줄 방법을 찾아볼 생각이에요.

1000633911.english: Continued from the epilogue of < Invitation from Paradise >.

1000633912.english: I mean, we have four routes to please the commander.
1000633912.korean: 우리에겐 사령관을 기쁘게 할 네 개의 루트가 있다는 걸 말이야.

1000633914.english: Hmm. This color and form... It was a talent too good to let rot away like this.
1000633914.korean: 으음. 이 색감 하며 형태력까지... 역시 이대로 썩혀두기엔 아까운 재능이었어.

1000633917.english: Why did Anne give up on becoming a painter? She loves painting so much...
1000633917.korean: 앤은 왜 화가가 되는 걸 포기하셨어요? 이렇게 그림을 좋아하시는데...

1000633918.english: ... It is said that people are not meant to live exactly as they want.
1000633918.korean: ... 사람은 원래 자기가 원하는 대로 살 수 없는 법이란다.

1000633919.english: Before I became a painter, I studied hard in case of failure. After all, only a very small number of people can make a living from painting.
1000633919.korean: 화가가 되기 전에 난 혹시 실패를 대비해 공부를 열심히 했었어. 그림으로 먹고살 수 있는 사람은 아주 극소수뿐 이니까.

1000633920.english: Unfortunately, I didn't have a talent for drawing, but perhaps because I had a talent for studying, I made it to college without any problems.
1000633920.korean: 불행하게도 나에게 그림의 재능은 없었지만, 공부의 재능은 있었는지 대학 졸업까지 문제없이 올라갔었어.

1000633921.english: But by then, my passion for painting had already cooled. Or rather, I was afraid to walk a path that might lead to failure at this point.
1000633921.korean: 하지만 그때쯤 내 안에 그림에 대한 열정은 이미 식어있었어. 아니 이제 와서 실패할지도 모르는 길을 걷는 게 두려웠었지.

1000633922.english: So at first, I was envious of you guys... I mean, you guys who draw what people want.
1000633922.korean: 그래서 난 처음에 너희가 부러웠었어... 사람들이 원하는 걸 그려내는 너희들이 말이야.

1000633924.english: No, I don't regret it anymore because I became a researcher, met you guys, and made good memories.
1000633924.korean: 아니, 연구원이 되었기 때문에 너희를 만나고 좋은 추억들이 생겼으니 이젠 후회 안 해.

1000633925.english: Life can be happy because of unexpected things.
1000633925.korean: 인생이란 예기치 못한 일 때문에 행복해질 수도 있는 거란다.

1000633926.english: Hehe. I'm glad to hear that Ann is happy.

1000633927.english: By the way, Ann. Is Machina doing well...?
1000633927.korean: 그런데 앤. 마키나는 잘 지내고 있나요...?

1000633928.english: Ann, please bear with me for a moment. I've called an ambulance, so just wait a little longer.
1000633928.korean: 앤 조금만 참아줘요. 구급차를 불렀으니 조금만 기다리면 돼요.

1000633929.english: Mery. What is it that resembles a human... but isn't human...?
1000633929.korean: 메리. 인간과 닮았으면서... 인간이 아닌 것이 뭔지... 아니?

1000633930.english: Are you talking about our Bioroid...?

1000633931.english: The correct answer is... an angel.

1000633932.english: You guys... were like angels to me...
1000633932.korean: 너흰... 내게 천사 같은... 그런 존재들이었어...

1000633937.english: Hah. Why are you looking so gloomy so early in the morning? You look better smiling.
1000633937.korean: 훗. 왜 그렇게 아침부터 우울한 표정을 짓고 있어? 넌 웃고 있는 편이 더 어울려.

1000633939.english: No, I didn't mean to make you apologize... Are you worried about something?
1000633939.korean: 아니, 사과시킬 생각은 없었는데... 무슨 고민이라도 있니?

1000633940.english: Yesterday, I guided a client to paradise. He asked me to call upon his lover, who had passed away several years ago.
1000633940.korean: 어제 한 고객님을 낙원으로 인도해주었어요. 그 고객님은 몇 년 전 돌아가신 자신의 연인을 불러 달라고 부탁했죠.

1000633941.english: After a brief, happy date in paradise, he said goodbye to his lover and left.
1000633941.korean: 잠시동안 낙원에서 행복한 데이트를 나눈 뒤, 그분은 연인께 작별 인사를 하고 떠나셨어요.

1000633943.english: Yes, it's a very sad story. But looking at him, I thought, why isn't he still in paradise?
1000633943.korean: 네, 아주 슬픈 얘기에요. 하지만 그분을 보며 저는 이런 생각을 하였어요. 왜 낙원에 계속 계시지 않은 걸까?

1000633944.english: With his wealth, he could easily live his entire life in paradise with his lover... But was his lover so valuable to him that he couldn't give up reality?
1000633944.korean: 그분의 재력이라면 평생을 낙원에서 연인과 살아도 부족하지 않을 텐데... 그분께 연인은 현실을 포기하지 못 할만큼의 가치였던 걸까요?

1000633945.english: But it was too sad to be like that, and he was happily holding his lover's hand...
1000633945.korean: 하지만 그렇다기엔 너무나 애절하고, 행복하게 연인의 손을 잡으셨어요...

1000633947.english: ...I see. If you stay in the virtual world for too long, you can't tell the difference from reality...
1000633947.korean: ... 그렇군요. 가상세계에 너무 오래 있으면 현실과 구분을 하지 못하게 되니...

1000633948.english: Just kidding. Paradise is a place to briefly escape reality and indulge your inner desires, not an escape from reality.
1000633948.korean: 농담이야. 낙원은 현실에서 잠깐 벗어나 마음속의 욕망을 풀어헤치는 장소이지 현실의 도피처가 아니야.

1000633949.english: The lovers you meet in paradise are ultimately just graphics. Loving a lover in paradise is completely different from loving your true lover.
1000633949.korean: 낙원에서 만난 연인은 결국 그래픽일 뿐이야. 낙원 속의 연인을 사랑하는 것은 진짜 자신의 연인을 사랑하는 것과는 다르게 되어버려.

1000633950.english: He probably knew that too, so he left. He still loves his lover, but sometimes, when things get too difficult, he comes looking for paradise.
1000633950.korean: 그분도 그 사실을 아니까 떠난 걸 거야. 아직도 연인을 사랑하지만, 가끔 너무 힘들 때 낙원을 찾아오시는 거겠지.

1000633951.english: ...I don't understand. Loving a lover in paradise is the same kind of love...
1000633951.korean: ... 저는 이해할 수 없어요. 낙원 속의 연인을 사랑하는 것도 똑같은 사랑일 텐데...

1000633952.english: Hmm... then how about this, Machina?
1000633952.korean: 으음... 그렇다면 이런 건 어때, 마키나?

1000633953.english: If I were to die and appear in paradise and give you advice, how would you take it?
1000633953.korean: 만약, 내가 죽고 낙원에서 내 모습이 나타나 네게 조언을 한다면 너는 어떻게 받아들일 거야?

1000633956.english: I think even paradise would be fine.

1000633957.english: Dr. Anne... Paradise will soon become real.
1000633957.korean: 앤 박사님... 이제 낙원이 곧 진짜가 될 거예요.

1000633958.english: - After finishing a slightly late year-end party, we were enjoying a brief moment of peace.
1000633958.korean: - 조금 늦은 연말 파티를 끝낸 우리는 잠시간의 평화를 즐기고 있었다.

1000633959.english: - Above all, we still had work to do.
1000633959.korean: - 무엇보다 우리에겐 아직 해야 할 일이 남아있었다.

1000633960.english: Alright, let's do that scene again. Ready, action!
1000633960.korean: 자, 그 장면 다시 한번 해보도록 하죠. 레디, 액션!

1000633961.english: You... why are you using the Murasaki style? Reveal your identity!
1000633961.korean: 당신이... 어째서 무라사키류를 쓰는 거지? 정체를 밝혀라!

1000633963.english: Even if one person disappears, I won't know.

1000633964.english: My sword... burns... the wind. And slices through the lightning.
1000633964.korean: 내 칼은... 바람을... 태우고. 번개를 가른다.

1000633966.english: Those two's acting skills have improved noticeably since waking up in paradise. Is this all thanks to their experience?
1000633966.korean: 낙원에서 깨어난 뒤로 저 두 사람 연기력이 눈에 띄게 좋아졌어요. 이게 다 경험 덕분일까요.

1000633967.english: Come to think of it, the reason I was kidnapped to Paradise was also because I was trying to get materials needed for acting instruction.
1000633967.korean: 그러고 보니 낙원에 납치당한 이유도 연기지도에 필요한 자료를 얻으려다 당한 것이었죠.

1000633968.english: - I was simply on my way to see Bismarck's work, but before I knew it, I had become entangled in an incident.
1000633968.korean: - 단순히 비스마르크의 작품을 보러 가는 길이었을 뿐이었는데 어느샌가 사건에 휘말리고 말았었다.

1000633969.english: If Paradise is also a Bismarck production, then thanks to that, the acting skills have improved, so the operation was a success anyway.
1000633969.korean: 낙원도 비스마스르크 작품이라고 한다면 덕분에 연기력이 올랐으니 어쨌든 작전은 성공이군요.

1000633970.english: Why are you acting like this, Commander?

1000633971.english: W-what! Th-th-that's just how I've always spoken!
1000633971.korean: 무, 무슨! 저저저는 원래 이런 말투였습니다만?

1000633973.english: Please forget about what happened in Paradise...

1000633975.english: Lord, did you see it? Kaen. How was it?

1000633977.english: After waking up in paradise, the script felt like my own work. Is this what it means to infuse emotion into acting?
1000633977.korean: 낙원에서 깨어난 후 대본이 정말 나의 일인 것처럼 느껴지더군. 이게 연기에 감정을 담는다는 것인가.

1000633978.english: You can look forward to this time, Lord.

1000633979.english: For the Lord. I'll show you more. The play.

1000633980.english: Ah! My Lord, you must not look yet. This play is for you, my Lord.
1000633980.korean: 앗! 주공 아직 보면 안 된다. 이 연극은 주공을 위한 것이니 말이다.

1000633981.english: Now, I need to do the final rehearsal.

1000633982.english: Yes, Commander, please look forward to it.

1000633983.english: - There is still time before the play, so I should go look around somewhere else so as not to disturb them.
1000633983.korean: - 아직 연극까지는 시간이 남았으니 그녀들의 방해가 되지 않게 다른 곳을 둘러보고 와야겠다.

1000633986.english: - Machina stood alone at the edge of the city, where only ruins remained.
1000633986.korean: - 폐허만이 남은 도시의 끝자락에 마키나가 홀로 서있었다.

1000633987.english: Even the holograms installed to prevent the Iron Bugs from coming have malfunctioned.
1000633987.korean: 철충들이 오지 못하게 설치한 홀로그램들마저 고장이 났군요.

1000633988.english: Everyone behind here is enjoying the festival. So, I cannot let you pass.
1000633988.korean: 이 뒤엔 모두 축제를 즐기고 계세요. 그러니 지나가게 못 합니다.

1000633990.english: Everyone was looking for you, where did you go?
1000633990.korean: 모두 찾고 있던데, 어디 가셨던 거예요?

1000633991.english: Wait, I was just getting some air.

1000633992.english: Number 5: Are you feeling a little better, Miss Barbariana?

1000633993.english: Yes, it's still a little difficult, but it's okay.

1000633994.english: A doctor told me not to worry, that my muscles had just atrophied from being in the virtual world for so long.
1000633994.korean: 닥터라는 분이 말씀해주셨는데 오랫동안 가상세계에만 있어서 근육이 쇠퇴한 거뿐이니 걱정하지 말라고 하셨어요.

1000633995.english: I'm walking a little bit now as part of my rehabilitation. Are you okay, Machina?
1000633995.korean: 저는 재활 운동 겸 이제 조금씩 걸어 다니는데 마키나씨는 괜찮으신가요?

1000633997.english: Hmm~ I've been in paradise for so long that I've forgotten how long it's been, but it feels really good to be outside.
1000633997.korean: 흐음~ 언제부터인지 잊을 정도로 낙원에 있다가 바깥에 나오니 정말 좋은 거 같아요.

1000633998.english: If I were alone, I would have stayed in the building with Machina-san forever. No, that would have been incredibly happy, too.
1000633998.korean: 저 혼자였으면 계속 마키나씨와 빌딩에만 있었을 텐데. 아니, 그것도 굉장히 행복했어요.

1000633999.english: But I also meet new people like this, hehehe.
1000633999.korean: 하지만 이렇게 새로운 분들도 만나고, 헤헤헤.

1000634001.english: Oh, did you know? In paradise, the air is always warm and refreshing, but here, the air is cold and stuffy. That's so new...
1000634001.korean: 앗, 알고 계셨나요? 낙원에서는 언제나 따뜻하고 산뜻한 공기를 맡았는데 여기에선 차갑고 퀘퀘한 공기가 흐르더라구요. 그게 또 새로워서...

1000634004.english: Hey, Machina-san? Why are you crying?

1000634005.english: I'm so sorry, Miss Barbariana, number 5...

1000634007.english: I took away your freedom, for my own peace...
1000634007.korean: 저는 당신들의 자유를 빼앗았어요. 저 혼자만의 안식을 위해서...

1000634008.english: It wasn't paradise. It was a cage I created... I locked you in a cage under the pretext of a good cause.
1000634008.korean: 그곳은 낙원이 아니었어요. 제가 만든 새장... 그럴싸한 대의명분으로 여러분들을 새장에 가두어버렸어요.

1000634010.english: ...I'm fine. It was my choice to enter paradise.
1000634010.korean: ... 저는 괜찮아요. 제가 낙원에 들어간 건 저의 선택이었어요.

1000634011.english: I was happy to be there. I mean it.
1000634011.korean: 그곳에서 지낸 것도 저는 행복했어요. 그건 진심이에요.

1000634012.english: So Machina-san... sob... don't cry. I cry too when someone else cries...
1000634012.korean: 그러니 마키나씨... 흐윽... 울지 마요. 저도 누가 울면 울음이....

1000634017.english: - I got off the Orca and looked around the city.

1000634018.english: - Now only ruins and broken machinery remained, but the resources left in the city were being loaded onto the ship.
1000634018.korean: - 이젠 폐허와 부서진 기계들밖에 남질 않았지만, 도시에 남아있는 자원들을 함선에 적재 중에 있었다.

1000634019.english: Oh my, you were here all along.

1000634020.english: Hehe. Looks like you've been wandering aimlessly again.
1000634020.korean: 후훗. 또 정처 없이 떠돌고 있었나 보군.

1000634021.english: - It was the first time I had met her in person since seeing her in Paradise, as I had been overwhelmed by piled-up work and parties.
1000634021.korean: - 에키드나와 낙원에서 본 뒤로 밀린 업무와 파티에 치여 직접 마주치는 것은 처음이었다.

1000634023.english: Hahaha. Right... I came here today to talk about that.
1000634023.korean: 후후후. 그래... 오늘은 그 얘기를 하려고 왔어.

1000634025.english: We definitely woke up in the building and decided to split up to look for you.
1000634025.korean: 분명 건물에서 깨어난 우리는 각자 흩어져 당신을 찾기로 했어.

1000634026.english: But I'm wandering around the building all alone, the AGSs are suddenly going wild, and Barbariana is sleeping in the room...
1000634026.korean: 그런데 나 혼자 건물에서 헤매고, AGS들은 갑자기 날뛰고, 방안엔 바바리아나가 자고 있고...

1000634027.english: Why did you leave only me behind!

1000634028.english: - I was so flustered back then that I didn't have time to look after Echidna.
1000634028.korean: - 그땐 정신이 없어 미처 에키드나를 챙길 틈이 없었다.

1000634029.english: Hmph, and when I woke up, you said you forgive Machina... Well, I heard the story.
1000634029.korean: 흥, 그리고 깨어나 보니 당신은 마키나를 용서한다고 하고... 뭐, 이야기는 들었어.

1000634030.english: ... I stopped by a restaurant for a moment while I was there, too. Hmm... that place was certainly worthy of being called paradise.
1000634030.korean: ... 겸사겸사 식당에도 잠깐 들렀었지. 으음... 그곳은 확실히 낙원이라 부르기 충분하더군.

1000634031.english: - I thought I knew why I hadn't encountered Echidna. Just then, a black object descended from the sky.
1000634031.korean: - 에키드나와 마주치지 못한 이유를 알 것 같았다. 그때 하늘에서 검은 물체가 내려왔다.

1000634032.english: Your Excellency the Commander. I see you were here.

1000634033.english: - I had heard that Roc, who woke up in paradise, spent more than three days alone in a corner.
1000634033.korean: - 낙원에서 깨어난 로크는 3일 넘게 구석에서 혼자만의 시간을 가졌다고 들었었다.

1000634034.english: Yes, Your Excellency. Since you asked if I was okay, I haven't sustained any damage severe enough to require repairs.
1000634034.korean: 네, 각하. 제게 괜찮다고 물어보시다니 저는 딱히 정비를 받을 정도의 데미지를 입지않았습니다.

1000634035.english: However, I apologize for causing you worry.

1000634036.english: And there is one more thing I need to apologize for. It happened when I fully woke up in Paradise.
1000634036.korean: 그리고 또 한 가지 사과드려야 할 일이 있습니다. 낙원에서 완전히 깨어났을 때의 일입니다.

1000634037.english: The Tyrant was running wild next to me, but I was lost in thought at the time.
1000634037.korean: 제 옆에선 타이런트가 폭주하였지만, 저는 그때 다른 생각에 빠져있었습니다.

1000634038.english: Why couldn't I, an AGS, wake up in the virtual world?
1000634038.korean: AGS인 제가 어째서 가상세계에서 깨어나지 못 한 것일까요?

1000634039.english: Deep down, I thought of myself as superior to bioroids. However, I am ultimately an AGS, a device where AI moves my body through circuits using electrical signals.
1000634039.korean: 마음속으론 스스로를 바이오로이드 보다 뛰어나다고 생각하였습니다. 그러나 저는 결국 Ai가 전기신호를 통해 회로를 타고 몸을 움직이는 AGS입니다.

1000634040.english: You might wonder if it is the same for living things, but our AGS and that of living things are a little different.
1000634040.korean: 생물도 똑같지 않느냐고 의문이 드실 수 있습니다만, 저희 AGS와 생물의 그것은 조금 다르지요.

1000634041.english: What is my body? What are the things my AI creates? What was the difference between me and the bioroids?
1000634041.korean: 제 몸은 무엇일까요? 제 Ai가 이루는 것들은 무엇일까요? 저와 바이오로이드의 차이가 무엇이었을까요?

1000634042.english: Well, wouldn't that just be a difference between whether or not you need to consume nutrition?
1000634042.korean: 그거야, 영양을 섭취해야 하느냐 마느냐 정도의 차이지 않겠느냐.

1000634043.english: Indeed, is that really all there is to it...?

1000634044.english: In any case, I was consumed by my thoughts there and failed to go to rescue Your Excellency in time.
1000634044.korean: 어찌 되었든, 그곳에서 저는 사념에 사로잡혀 미처 제시간에 각하를 구하러 가지 못하였습니다.

1000634045.english: - I never would have thought Roc was struggling with such complicated issues... What should I say to him?
1000634045.korean: - 로크가 그런 복잡한 고민을 하고 있을 줄이야... 뭐라고 답해주어야 할까.

1000634046.english: And the green-haired girl... after I saved the bioroid, she kept calling me Chorong.
1000634046.korean: 그리고 초록머리 암... 바이오로이드를 구해주었더니, 제게 자꾸 초롱이라고 부르더군요.

1000634047.english: Yes, actually, I was worried about that again.
1000634047.korean: 네, 실은 그것 때문에 또 고민하였습니다.

1000634048.english: Paradise is a place where even the AGS can fulfill their desires, but I have not seen the apparition of my former master, Duke Angel, nor even my brothers.
1000634048.korean: 낙원이 AGS들 조차 그 욕망을 실현시켜주는 공간이지만 저는 전 주인이신 앙헬 공의 환영도, 제 형제들조차 보지 못하였습니다.

1000634049.english: Was my desire... the desire hidden deep within my circuit... to become Chorong... Your Excellency's pet?
1000634049.korean: 제 욕망은... 제 회로 깊은 곳에 숨은 욕망은 초롱이... 각하의 애완동물이 되는 것이었던 걸까요?

1000634050.english: see... Thank you, Your Excellency. Thanks to you, one question has been resolved.
1000634050.korean: 그랬군요... 감사합니다, 각하. 덕분에 한 가지 의문이 풀렸습니다.

1000634051.english: Were AGSs originally beings that agonized like this?
1000634051.korean: AGS들이란 원래 이렇게 고민을 하는 존재였던가?

1000634052.english: Vanilla, that female Bioroid, said she had developed a fondness for him too, and she kept watching over Tyrant from his side.
1000634052.korean: 바닐라, 그 여성 바이오로이드는 자신에게도 보리가 생겼다며 계속 타이런트의 곁에서 지켜보고 있더군요.

1000634053.english: - Is Vanilla envious of Constantia's barley?

1000634054.english: Even though I’m putting her to sleep, isn’t she scared at all...? Th... Of course I’m fine, though.
1000634054.korean: 아무리 재우고 있다지만, 그 여자는 무섭지도 않은 건가...? 무... 물론 나는 괜찮지만 말이야.

1000634055.english: Your Excellency, the question has been resolved, but... may I ask you a favor?
1000634055.korean: 각하, 의문은 풀렸지만... 한 가지 부탁을 드려도 되겠습니까?

1000634056.english: I hadn't been active for a long time, so I felt a bit... like it might be time to return to being a combatant.
1000634056.korean: 오랫동안 기동을 안 해서 조금... 다시 전투원으로 돌아가야 할 때가 아닌가 생각이 들더군요.

1000634057.english: If Your Excellency grants me permission, I will go and deal with the nearby Iron Bug.
1000634057.korean: 각하만 허락해주신다면 근처의 철충들을 처리하고 오겠습니다.

1000634058.english: - With Roc's level of military prowess, I wasn't even worried about facing the Iron Bug.
1000634058.korean: - 로크 정도의 무력이라면 철충들이 상대라도 걱정이 안 되기도 하였다.

1000634059.english: Thank you, Your Excellency. To put it in the words the bioroids use, I’m going to go get some fresh air.
1000634059.korean: 감사합니다, 각하. 바이오로이드 분들이 쓰는 말로 표현하자면 조금 바람을 쐬고 오겠습니다.

1000634060.english: If you don't mind, Echidna, would you like to come along?

1000634061.english: Hmm. That’s fine, but I’d like to fill up on all the things I haven’t been able to eat lately...
1000634061.korean: 흐음. 그것도 괜찮지만, 난 요즘 들어 못 먹은 걸 잔뜩 채우고 싶은데...

1000634063.english: Is this something to eat? I happen to know that it is also called a delicacy. If you come, I will give it to you.
1000634063.korean: 먹는 것입니까. 마침 저 또한 진미라고 불리는 것을 알고 있지요. 만약 가신다면 그것을 드리겠습니다.

1000634065.english: You wash up well and wait, too.

1000634066.english: - With that, Roc flew toward the sky with Echidna on his back.
1000634066.korean: - 그러며 로크는 에키드나를 태운 채 상공을 향해 날아갔다.

1000634067.english: ...You said you would give me some delicacies?

1000634070.english: This is a top-of-the-line lithium battery. The Pupp Head says it's a delicacy that literally energizes the entire circuit. It's a precious commodity, but we're offering it as a special treat.
1000634070.korean: 최고급 리튬 배터리입니다. 펍 헤드의 말로는 그야말로 전 회로를 톡 쏘는 진미라고 하더군요. 귀한 것이지만 특별히 양보해드리는 것입니다.

1000634072.english: Throwing that rare power on the ground...! I thought you could do it since you also move with electricity, but I guess I still don't understand Bioroids.
1000634072.korean: 저 희귀한 전력을 바닥에 던지다니...! 당신도 전기로 움직이길래 가능한 줄 알았는데, 역시 아직 바이오로이드를 이해할 수 없군.

1000634073.english: I am not fit to enjoy this kind of pleasure!!!!
1000634073.korean: 난 이런 쾌락을 즐길 수 없는 몸이야!!!!

1000634075.english: - I saw Brownie moving the materials and wanted to help, but I could only watch them due to the strong dissuasion of the Leprechaun and Efreeti.
1000634075.korean: - 브라우니가 자재 옮기는 걸 본 나는 도와줄까 하였지만 레프리콘과 이프리트의 적극적인 만류에 그녀들을 지켜볼 수밖에 없었다.

1000634077.english: - I approached Khan, who was standing far away.
1000634077.korean: - 나는 멀리 서 있던 칸에게 다가갔다.

1000634078.english: - Khan was watching the bouquet of flowers placed on the floor.
1000634078.korean: - 칸은 바닥에 내려놓은 꽃다발을 지켜보고 있었다.

1000634080.english: Wait, I was honoring my old comrades.

1000634081.english: Before the Commander came... Those who were with me a long time ago.
1000634081.korean: 사령관이 오기 전... 아주 예전 나와 함께했던 이들 말이다.

1000634082.english: - By the way, I heard from Arsenal that Khan saw her old comrades in paradise.
1000634082.korean: - 그러고 보니 아스널에게서 칸은 낙원에서 옛 전우들을 보았다고 들었었다.

1000634083.english: - I wonder if she still misses her old comrades?
1000634083.korean: - 역시 아직 그녀는 옛 전우들을 그리워하는 걸까?

1000634084.english: When I spoke to Cerestia, she gave me a bouquet of flowers. Thanks to her, I was able to leave some flowers behind.
1000634084.korean: 세레스티아에게 말을 하니 내게 꽃다발을 주더군. 덕분에 꽃이라도 놓고 갈 수가 있었어.

1000634085.english: Of course, this isn't where they died or where their bodies are...
1000634085.korean: 물론, 이곳에서 그들이 죽은 것도 그들의 시신이 있는 곳도 아니지만...

1000634086.english: I just... wanted to do that.

1000634088.english: - Khan turned her head towards me for a moment.

1000634090.english: I've never been able to forget them even once. I want to run out and see their faces right now.
1000634090.korean: 이제껏 단 한 번도 잊을 수 없었다. 지금 당장이라도 그들의 얼굴을 보러 달려 나가고 싶다.

1000634091.english: ...I used to think so, but I don't think so anymore since I saw their faces in paradise a few days ago.
1000634091.korean: ... 라고 생각했었지만 며칠 전 낙원에서 그들의 얼굴을 보게 되었으니 지금은 그런 생각은 하지 않는다.

1000634092.english: Even though it was a fantasy, I was able to make my wish come true.
1000634092.korean: 비록 환상이었다지만, 소원을 이룰 수 있었어.

1000634093.english: So I wanted to hold a brief funeral here. It's just my own personal satisfaction, but...
1000634093.korean: 그래서 이곳에서 잠깐 장례를 치러주고 싶었다. 혼자만의 만족일 뿐이지만...

1000634094.english: Commander, wait... may I lean on you?

1000634095.english: - Khan leaned her face against mine.

1000634096.english: I'm sorry. I didn't want to show you my ugly face.
1000634096.korean: 미안하다. 그대에게 추한 얼굴을 보이고 싶지 않았다.

1000634097.english: I hope to one day collect their bodies and give them a proper funeral.
1000634097.korean: 언젠가 다시 그들의 시신을 수습하고 제대로 된 장례를 치러 주고 싶다.

1000634098.english: But for now, I can bear it. I still have my proud unit members...
1000634098.korean: 하지만 지금은 이걸로 난 참을 수 있다. 내겐 자랑스러운 부대원들이 남아있으니...

1000634100.english: Is it alright for me to entrust my men and myself to you, Commander?
1000634100.korean: 내 부대원들과 나를 그대에게 맡겨도 괜찮은 것일까, 사령관?

1000634101.english: - To think that even she, a battle-hardened veteran who’s been active since before the fall, had this side to her... Or maybe she’d just been hiding it all this time. After all, she’s always been a strong and impressive commander.
1000634101.korean: - 멸망 전부터 활약해온 백전연마의 그녀에게도 이런 면모가 있었다니... 아니, 이제껏 숨겨왔던 걸까. 그녀는 언제까지나 강하고 멋진 지휘관이니까.

1000634103.english: - She wiped her face and returned to her usual self.
1000634103.korean: - 그녀는 얼굴을 닦으며 다시 언제나의 칸으로 돌아왔다.

1000634104.english: The wind is cold. Would you like to go back to Orca together?

1000634105.english: - I took Khan back to Orca.

1000634107.english: My steps are not moving smoothly today.

1000634108.english: Just now... I thank you, Commander.

1000634109.english: Yes. It's always been that way, but today was the first time I felt it so deeply.
1000634109.korean: 그렇지. 항상 그래왔지만, 오늘만큼 그걸 체감한 건 처음이었다.

1000634110.english: ...There's still some time left until the play.

1000634112.english: Commander, I'm only asking you for a favor today... But if it's alright, can I ask you one more favor?
1000634112.korean: 사, 사령관. 오늘은 그대에게 부탁만 하는군... 하지만 괜찮다면 한 번만 더 부탁을 해도 되겠나?

1000634114.english: I, too, sometimes... very occasionally... have a hard time holding on. I can't tell anyone...
1000634114.korean: 나도 가끔... 아주 가끔은... 버티기 힘들 때가 있다. 누구에게도 말할 수 없지...

1000634115.english: So, just for today, won't you comfort me... I want to be comforted by you.
1000634115.korean: 그러니 오늘만은 날 위로해 주지 않겠나... 그대에게 위로를 받고 싶다.

1000634118.english: - And for a while, as her commander, I comforted her.
1000634118.korean: - 그리고 한동안 그녀의 사령관으로서 그녀를 위로해 주었다.

1000634119.english: - Swift Khan. I once heard a story about how, long ago, she crossed the desert and raced across the plains. She, who once raced toward the world, is now...
1000634119.korean: - 신속의 칸. 옛날, 그녀가 사막을 가로지르며, 초원을 달렸다는 얘기를 들었었다. 세상을 향해 달리던 그녀는 지금...

1000634120.english: - She poured out her sorrow in my arms.

1000634121.english: - I should take this opportunity to interview Phantom and Wraith.

1000634123.english: - I returned to the command room and called Phantom and Wraith.
1000634123.korean: - 사령관실로 돌아온 나는 팬텀과 레이스를 호출하였다.

1000634125.english: Have you called your spouse, Commander?

1000634126.english: - As soon as Phantom entered, she bowed her head and trembled.
1000634126.korean: - 팬텀은 들어오자마자 고개를 숙이고 덜덜 떨면서 절을 했다.

1000634128.english: But, I'm being sent to a theme park for assaulting the Commander... Ugh... Please forgive me.
1000634128.korean: 그렇지만, 저는 사령관님을 폭행한 죄로... 테마파크에 보내진다고... 흐윽... 용서해 주세요.

1000634129.english: Commander! Phantom may have done something wrong, but she was under Machina’s hypnosis. Can’t we just let it slide?
1000634129.korean: 사령관! 팬텀 선배는 분명 잘못된 일을 저지르긴 했지만, 마키나에 의한 최면이었다. 정상침작은 안 되겠나?

1000634132.english: So then, why did you call us?

1000634133.english: - Looking at the members in paradise, I thought that it was also necessary to relieve their desires.
1000634133.korean: - 낙원에서 대원들의 모습을 보며, 그들의 욕망을 풀어주는 것도 필요하다는 생각이 들었다.

1000634135.english: Yes, that's right. I'm glad I partnered with Senior Phantom, but... that's...
1000634135.korean: 그, 그렇다. 팬텀 선배와 파트너를 한 것은 기쁘지만... 그건...

1000634139.english: - I prepared special clothes to make their desires come true.
1000634139.korean: - 나는 그녀들의 욕망을 실현시켜주기 위해 특별한 옷을 준비하였다.

1000634142.english: Ugh... Ugh... No way, it's for me

1000634143.english: I can't believe I'm wearing Phantom Senior's clothes...

1000634145.english: Okay, that's okay, senior. That's perfect.

1000634146.english: Should we really do this, Commander?

1000634147.english: Hmph... Understood, Commander. I will do so.

1000634156.english: Not yet... How embarrassing for us, Commander...

1000634157.english: - No, this is all for their benefit. It's not about embarrassing them.
1000634157.korean: - 아니, 이건 전부 그녀들을 위한 것이다. 절대 창피를 주기 위한 일이 아니다.

1000634159.korean: 훗, 이 정도는 아무 일도 아니다. 사령관.

1000634160.english: Clearly, AL Cute is the embodiment of our desires, but unfortunately, Phantom Senior also likes espresso in general!
1000634160.korean: 분명 AL큐트는 우리의 욕망이 구현된 것이지만, 안타깝게도 팬텀선배는 평소에도 에스프레소를 좋아한다!

1000634164.english: Hmph, the commander is underestimating Senior Phantom. An espresso is just a palate cleanser to her.
1000634164.korean: 흥, 사령관은 팬텀 선배를 얕보고 있군. 에스프레소 정도는 입가심으로 하신다.

1000634166.english: - Phantom shivered and downed a cup of espresso in one gulp.
1000634166.korean: - 팬텀은 덜덜 떨더니 단숨에 에스프레소를 한잔 들이켰다.

1000634170.english: - Then, after a moment’s hesitation, Phantom downed her second shot of espresso.
1000634170.korean: - 그리고 팬텀은 잠깐 망설이더니 두 잔째 에스프레소를 들이켰다.

1000634171.english: As expected, it's Phantom Sunbae. She does things we can't do with such aplomb. That's thrilling.
1000634171.korean: 역시 팬텀선배다. 우리가 못 하는 걸 태연스럽게 해버린다. 그 점에 전율한다.

1000634174.english: - Phantom couldn't hold it in any longer and spit out the espresso.

1000634175.english: Yes... yes. Ugh... please forgive me.

1000634176.english: Sorry, Wraith... I can't drink espresso either. I just wanted to show you how cool I am...
1000634176.korean: 미안해, 레이스... 사실 나도 에스프레소를 못 마셔. 네게 멋진 모습만 보이고 싶었는데...

1000634177.english: Senior... That's okay. I'm the same way. But didn't you calmly drink a glass?
1000634177.korean: 선배... 그래도 괜찮다. 나도 그렇다. 그래도 선배는 태연하게 한 잔을 마시지 않았는가?

1000634178.english: ...let's have a caramel macchiato together next time.

1000634179.english: - Oh, was that too much? I guess I should stop tormenting them both.
1000634179.korean: - 이런, 너무 심했던 걸까. 둘을 괴롭히는 건 이쯤에서 그만두어야겠다.

1000634181.english: Ah... ah... there's espresso on the Commander's pants...

1000634182.english: I'll clean it for you right now.

1000634183.english: No, I did it, so let me clean it up!
1000634183.korean: 아뇨, 제가 한 일이니 제가 치우게 해주세요!

1000634184.english: Yes, Commander. I'll help you wipe your pants too.
1000634184.korean: 그렇다, 사령관. 나도 바지 닦는 걸 도와주겠다.

1000634185.english: - But two warriors started running to wipe my pants.
1000634185.korean: - 그러나 두 명의 전사들은 내 바지를 닦기 위해 달려들기 시작했다.

1000634186.english: Commander, don't move. It's getting harder to get undressed.

1000634187.english: Yes, Commander. We'll take responsibility and do the laundry for you!
1000634187.korean: 그렇습니다, 사령관님. 저희가 책임지고 세탁을 해드리겠습니다!

1000634188.english: - I was overwhelmed by their momentum and ended up having my pants snatched away.
1000634188.korean: - 그들의 기세에 눌려 막지 못한 나는 결국 바지를 빼앗겨 버렸다.

1000634189.english: I will definitely clean up any mistakes I make, Commander.
1000634189.korean: 제가 흘린 실수는 제가 확실하게 치우겠습니다, 사령관님.

1000634190.english: By the way, Senior Phantom... Does the Commander usually wear two pairs of pants?
1000634190.korean: 그런데, 팬텀 선배... 사령관은 원래 바지를 두 개 입나?

1000634191.english: There are small underwear inside the commander's trousers.
1000634191.korean: 사령관 바지 안에 작은 속바지가 있다.

1000634194.english: - The last hope for humanity's reconstruction was revealed before their eyes.
1000634194.korean: - 그들의 눈앞에 인류 재건 최후의 희망이 그 모습을 드러내고 있었다.

1000634195.english: Ah... Ah... Really... I'm sorry, Commander!

1000634196.english: Sorry, sorry... I was trying to make up for my mistake... I'll take responsibility for both of them and wash them, Commander!
1000634196.korean: 죄, 죄송합니다... 실수를 만회하려고 했는데... 두 개 다 책임지고 세탁해 오겠습니다, 사령관님!

1000634197.english: - Phantom and Wraith ran out in surprise, leaving me alone in the empty room.
1000634197.korean: - 팬텀과 레이스는 놀라며 뛰처나갔고 나는 빈방에 홀로 남겨져 버렸다.

1000634198.english: - In the end, I had no choice but to take out a new pair of pants from the closet and wear them because of the feeling of emptiness in my lower body.
1000634198.korean: - 허전해진 아랫도리의 감각에 결국, 옷장에서 새로운 바지를 꺼내 입을 수밖에 없었다.

1000634199.english: - I feel like I've been hit by a lot of people lately. I need to take some time for myself.
1000634199.korean: - 요즘 들어 많은 사람들에게 치인 느낌이다. 잠깐, 혼자만의 시간을 가져야겠다.

1000634200.english: - I gazed alone at the ruins. Now nothing but collapsed buildings remained, but once upon a time, a glass building, sparkling like that landscape, stood there.
1000634200.korean: - 나는 홀로 폐허를 쳐다보았다. 이젠 무너진 건물밖에 없는 이곳이지만, 예전엔 그 풍경처럼 반짝거리는 유리빌딩이 서 있던 곳이겠지.

1000634201.english: - Ruins where remnants of ancient humanity remain...

1000634202.english: - "I had a mission to rebuild humanity. So, will there ever come a day in the distant future when tall buildings will rise on these ruins again?"
1000634202.korean: - 내겐 인류 재건의 사명이 있었다. 그렇다면 먼 미래 다시 이 폐허에 높은 빌딩들이 올라오는 날이 오는 걸까...

1000634203.english: I was just looking for you. What are you doing in a place like this, Commander?
1000634203.korean: 마침 그대를 찾고 있던 참이었는데 이런 곳에서 뭘 하고 있는 거지, 사령관?

1000634204.english: - Then Arsenal called me from behind.
1000634204.korean: - 그때 내 뒤에서 아스널이 날 불렀다.

1000634205.english: No matter how safe the space is, it's dangerous to be alone, Commander.
1000634205.korean: 아무리 안전한 공간이지만 혼자는 위험하다, 사령관.

1000634206.english: Wow, you're showing her a lot of trust.

1000634207.english: I had some personal business for you... It'll be a bit difficult here.
1000634207.korean: 그대에게 개인적인 용무가 있었는데... 여기선 조금 힘들겠군.

1000634208.english: Would it be okay for the two of you to meet in person?

1000634210.english: It's a hard-earned drink, would you like a drink?

1000634211.english: - Arsenal poured a red drink onto the table.
1000634211.korean: - 아스널은 탁자 위로 붉은빛의 술을 따라주었다.

1000634212.english: - The drink Arsenal gave me tasted very sweet.
1000634212.korean: - 아스널이 준 술은 아주 달콤한 맛이 났다.

1000634213.english: It's a fruit liquor, so it'll taste good.
1000634213.korean: 과일로 만든 담금주라 맛이 괜찮을 거야.

1000634214.english: Commander. The days I spent with you were truly perilous.
1000634214.korean: 사령관. 그대와 함께 하는 날들은 정말 위험 가득한 나날들이었지.

1000634215.english: Not only the Metal Parasites, but also the Star Child and Lemonade...
1000634215.korean: 철충들 뿐만 아니라 별의 아이, 레모네이드까지...

1000634216.english: Besides, this time I came only to see Bismark's work, but I ended up suffering in paradise.
1000634216.korean: 게다가 이번엔 비스마르크의 작품을 보기 위해 왔을 뿐인데 낙원에서 고생하게 되었지.

1000634217.english: But I enjoyed every moment I spent with you.
1000634217.korean: 하지만 그대와 함께하는 매 순간이 난 즐거웠다.

1000634218.english: Hmm... I didn't come here to say this, but the words just came out without me knowing.
1000634218.korean: 으음... 이런 얘기를 하려고 온 것은 아니지만 나도 모르게 말이 튀어나왔군.

1000634219.english: If there's one thing I learned from my time in paradise, it's that unconditional expression of desire is not good.
1000634219.korean: 낙원에서의 일에 내가 한 가지 배운 점이라면 무조건 적인 욕망의 표출은 좋지 않다는 것이었지.

1000634220.english: ...I think it is right to give awards to those who have made meritorious achievements, but what do you think, Commander?
1000634220.korean: ... 나는 공훈을 세운 자에게는 상을 주는 것이 옳다고 생각하는데 사령관의 생각은 어떤가?

1000634221.english: - It was a completely contradictory statement, but I accepted it for now because it wasn't wrong.
1000634221.korean: - 앞뒤가 전혀 안 맞는 말이었지만, 틀린 말은 아니기에 일단 수긍했다.

1000634222.english: And I think I've done enough to deserve an award, but what do you think?
1000634222.korean: 그리고 난 상을 받을 만큼의 공훈을 세웠다고 생각한다만 그대의 생각은 어떻지?

1000634223.english: - Arsenal has performed in a way that no one could ignore. If she wanted an award, they could have given her anything.
1000634223.korean: - 아스널은 지금껏 누가 봐도 무시 못 할 활약을 하였었다. 그녀가 상을 원한다면 그게 무엇이든지 줄 수 있었다.

1000634224.english: Hahahaha! I was waiting for you to say that.
1000634224.korean: 후후훗. 하하하하! 그대의 그 말을 기다렸다.

1000634225.english: I want you as a reward.

1000634226.english: - Arsenal came closer to me little by little.

1000634227.english: This is my personal desire... but I'm justified. Isn't it just receiving an award?
1000634227.korean: 이건 나의 개인적인 욕망에 의한 것... 이지만, 나는 정당하다. 상을 받는 것뿐이지 않는가?

1000634228.english: The battlefield I was on with you was always a series of dangerous days...
1000634228.korean: 그대와 함께했던 전장은 항상 위험한 날들의 연속이었지...

1000634229.english: But today is a safe day for me.

1000634230.english: It's no use running away, you know. You're not going to come back now, are you?
1000634230.korean: 그대여 도망쳐도 소용없다. 설마 이제 와서 무르는 것은 아니겠지?

1000634231.english: - As I watched her approach, I suddenly felt my blood boil.
1000634231.korean: - 다가오는 그녀를 보며 나는 갑자기 몸 안의 피가 끓어오르는 느낌을 받았다.

1000634232.english: Hehe. Looks like it's starting to take effect.

1000634233.english: What you drank was... Bokbunja wine, which is good for your health! Hahaha!
1000634233.korean: 그대가 마신 것은... 몸에 좋다는 복분자주다! 하하하!

1000634234.english: Tonight, you will pay dearly for making my heart flutter, Commander.
1000634234.korean: 오늘 밤은, 내 마음이 동하게 만든 대가를 톡톡히 치러야 할 거야. 사령관.

1000634237.english: - I looked behind me and saw Night Angel walking down the hallway.
1000634237.korean: - 뒤를 보니 나이트앤젤이 복도에서 걸어오고 있었다.

1000634239.english: Yes, Commander, may I ask you a favor? With our Captain...
1000634239.korean: 네, 사령관님 한 가지 부탁을 드려도 되겠습니까? 저희 대장님이랑...

1000634240.english: No, even so, isn't it still not that bad...
1000634240.korean: 아니, 아무리 그래도 아직 그 정도는 아닌가...

1000634241.english: - Night Angel suddenly stopped speaking and fell into thought.
1000634241.korean: - 나이트앤젤은 갑자기 말을 멈추고 생각에 잠겼다.

1000634242.english: Oh... It's nothing. I was just looking for Machina. Do you happen to know where she is?
1000634242.korean: 아... 아무것도 아닙니다. 마키나를 찾고 있었습니다. 혹시 어디 있는 줄 아시나요?

1000634243.english: After bringing Machina out of Paradise, she blamed herself and lived apart from everyone except Mery.
1000634243.korean: - 낙원에서 마키나를 꺼내온 후, 그녀는 자신을 자책하며 메리를 제외한 모두와 떨어져 지내고 있었다.

1000634244.english: When you say Mery, you mean the wanted criminal... no, not that girl in the yellow dress, right? Thank you.
1000634244.korean: 메리라면 수배범... 이 아니라 그 노란 원피스 소녀를 말씀하시는 거죠. 감사합니다.

1000634245.english: - As soon as she heard the answer, Night Angel quickly flew up into the sky. Why on earth is she looking for Machina... Could it be because of what happened in Paradise?
1000634245.korean: - 나이트앤젤은 대답을 듣자마자 빠르게 하늘로 날아갔다. 대체 왜 마키나를 찾는 걸까... 혹시 낙원에서의 일 때문에?

1000634249.english: - I ran outside as fast as I could, but as expected, it was impossible to catch up to Night Angel.
1000634249.korean: - 열심히 바깥으로 달려 나갔지만, 역시 나이트앤젤을 따라잡기란 무리였다.

1000634250.english: - Before we knew it, the day had ended, and the setting sun was illuminating this place.
1000634250.korean: - 날은 어느샌가 저물어 석양이 이곳을 비추고 있었다.

1000634251.english: Do you think Master will really like this, Lise-nee?
1000634251.korean: 주인님이 이런 걸 정말 좋아해 줄까, 리제 언니?

1000634252.english: - On the way chasing Night Angel, I saw Lise and Aqua sitting in a flower garden.
1000634252.korean: - 나이트앤젤을 쫓던 길, 꽃밭에 앉아있는 리제와 아쿠아가 보였다.

1000634253.english: Of course! It's made with our sincerity, so Master will surely like it.
1000634253.korean: 당연하지 우리의 정성이 담긴 것이니 주인님께서 분명 좋아해 주실 거야.

1000634254.english: Besides, everything we prepared withered away because of that damn pest, Machina!
1000634254.korean: 게다가 우리가 준비했던 건 마키나 그 망할 해충 때문에 모두 시들어버렸어!

1000634255.english: Ugh... but a flower crown? That's so tacky...

1000634257.english: H-hic! Ah... no. I mean... Master, you must have lots of sparkling, jewel-like things around you... so I was thinking Aqua and Lise's might look shabby...
1000634257.korean: 힉! 아...아니. 그러니까... 주인님은 주변에 보석 같은 반짝이는 것들도 많이 있을 텐데... 아쿠아랑 리제 언니 거는 초라해 보이지 않을까 생각해서...

1000634259.english: I heard a story about scarcity. In a gem mine, the gems themselves don't stand out, but if a flower crown is there, it certainly stands out, even if its value drops.
1000634259.korean: 내가 들은 얘기지만, 희소성이란 게 있단다. 보석 광산에서 보석은 눈에 띄지 않지만, 꽃 왕관이 그곳에 있으면 가치가 떨어질지언정 눈에 확실히 띄게 돼.

1000634260.english: Among all the odds and ends the pests have gathered, this bouquet will actually stand out. And when Master sees it, he will surely recognize my love.
1000634260.korean: 해충들이 모은 잡동사니들 중에서 이 꽃다발은 오히려 빛을 발할 거야. 그리고 그걸 보면 분명 주인님도 내 사랑을 알아줄 거야.

1000634261.english: Who did you hear that from?

1000634263.english: Anyway, I’ve changed my strategy, Aqua. If I monopolize Master’s love, I’ve come to feel willing to share a little with you, my little sibling.
1000634263.korean: 어쨌든 나도 전략을 바꾸었단다, 아쿠아. 내가 주인님의 사랑을 독차지하게 되면 내 동생인 너한테도 조금 베풀어줄 마음이 생기게 되었어.

1000634264.english: Aqua still doesn't want to do this kind of thing anymore...
1000634264.korean: 아쿠아는 그래도 이제 이런 거 하기 싫은데...

1000634265.english: Listen up, Aqua. I am also one of the nurses on the Orca.
1000634265.korean: 아쿠아 잘 들으렴, 나 또한 오르카호의 간호사중에 하나란다.

1000634266.english: Don't forget that someday, if you get hurt and come to the recovery room, I might be the one to take care of you.
1000634266.korean: 언젠가 네가 다쳐서 수복실로 왔을 때 널 간호해 줄 사람이 내가 될 수도 있다는 사실을 잊지마렴?

1000634267.english: Ah... Aqua will do her best to help Lise-nee!
1000634267.korean: 아... 아쿠아는 열심히 리제 언니를 도울게!

1000634268.english: Hahaha. You're a good boy. That's just like my little brother...
1000634268.korean: 후후후. 착하다. 그래야 내 동생 답지...

1000634271.english: Master! Aqua and Lise were preparing a gift for you.
1000634271.korean: 주인님! 아쿠아랑 리제언니랑 주인님을 위해 선물을 준비하고 있었어.

1000634272.english: Yes, Master. I was preparing Christmas presents, although I am still short on quantity.
1000634272.korean: 네, 주인님. 아직 개수가 부족하지만 크리스마스 선물을 준비하고 있었어요.

1000634273.english: - A huge pile of flower crowns lay next to Lise. But they say there aren’t enough... Just how many did she plan to make...?
1000634273.korean: - 리제의 옆에는 꽃 왕관이 수북하게 쌓여있었다. 그런데 개수가 부족하다니... 얼마나 만들 셈이었던 걸까...

1000634274.english: All the gifts we prepared have withered... ... But for you, Master.
1000634274.korean: 저희가 준비했던 선물은 모두 시들어버렸어요... ... 하지만 저는 주인님을 위해.

1000634275.english: There are still a few left until the hundred, so please wait just a little longer, Master. Hehehe.
1000634275.korean: 아직 백 개까지는 조금 남았으니 조금만 기다려주세요, 주인님. 히히히.

1000634276.english: What? But, in order for my love to be conveyed...
1000634276.korean: 네? 그렇지만, 제 사랑이 전해지기 위해선...

1000634278.english: - Lise placed a crown woven from red flowers on my head.
1000634278.korean: - 리제는 붉은색의 꽃들로 엮은 왕관을 내게 씌어다 주었다.

1000634279.english: Yes... Master, you have always been my prince. So, I prepared a crown for you. It suits you so well.
1000634279.korean: 네... 주인님은 언제나 저의 왕자님이셨어요. 그래서 주인님을 위해 왕관을 준비했어요. 너무 잘 어울려요.

1000634280.english: Did even a little bit of my overflowing love reach you, Master?
1000634280.korean: 저의 넘치는 사랑이 조금이라도 주인님께 닿았을까요?

1000634281.english: Even while imprisoned in the dungeon in Paradise, Lise did not lose consciousness. She woke Lilith up and came to rescue me.
1000634281.korean: - 낙원에서 지하 감옥에 갇히면서도 리제는 정신을 잃지 않았다. 리리스를 깨우고 나를 구하러 와주었다.

1000634282.english: - I feel I should at least repay her for the crown.
1000634282.korean: - 그런 그녀에게 적어도 왕관에 대한 보답이라도 해야겠다.

1000634283.english: - I brushed Lise's bangs to the side and kissed her forehead.
1000634283.korean: - 나는 리제의 앞머리를 옆으로 넘기고 그녀의 이마에 입맞춤하였다.

1000634284.english: - I took Lise's hand and kissed the back of her hand.
1000634284.korean: - 나는 리제의 손을 잡고 그녀의 손등에 키스하였다.

1000634285.english: Ah... Ahh... Master!!! Master!! This is... too... stimulating for me...
1000634285.korean: 아... 아아... 주인님!!! 주인님!! 이런 건 제게 자극이... 너무...

1000634287.english: - Lise suddenly collapsed in the flower field.

1000634289.english: Master and Lise did it! I told you, we did it!!

1000634291.english: - Aqua saw Lise lying on the ground and flew off into the distance. I had a feeling she was going to spread some bad rumors.
1000634291.korean: - 아쿠아는 쓰러진 리제를 보더니 멀리 날아가 버렸다. 왠지 안 좋은 소문을 퍼트릴 것 같은 예감이 들었다.

1000634295.english: Wait a moment, please listen to me!

1000634296.english: Regarding what happened in Paradise... Machina was certainly at fault. However, she also had her own reasons.
1000634296.korean: 낙원에 있었던 일들은... 분명 마키나가 잘못하긴 했어요. 하지만 그녀에게도 그런 사정이 있었어요.

1000634297.english: I don't know what you're talking about, but I don't care about such circumstances.
1000634297.korean: 무슨 소리인지 모르겠지만, 난 그런 사정 따위 상관 안 해.

1000634298.english: Then why on earth are you looking for Machina?
1000634298.korean: 그럼 대체 왜 마키나를 찾고 계시는 거죠?

1000634299.english: I wish you would do for us what you did in Paradise again.
1000634299.korean: 낙원에서 우리에게 했던 걸 다시 해줬으면 해.

1000634301.english: Machina decided not to do things like that without brother’s permission... Instead,
1000634301.korean: 마키나는 오라버니 허락 없이 함부로 그런 걸 안 하기로 했어요... 대신

1000634302.english: I'll draw Night Angel's breasts for you, okay?
1000634302.korean: 제가 나이트 앤젤님의 가슴을 그려드릴게요, 네?

1000634304.english: Oh my, Mery. What were you doing in a place like this?
1000634304.korean: 어머, 메리. 이런 곳에서 뭘 하고 계셨나요?

1000634307.english: Well, that’s a rare look on your face. But more importantly, I have a favor to ask of you. I’d like you to do for us again what you did for us in Paradise.
1000634307.korean: 참, 보기 힘든 얼굴이군. 그것보다 당신에게 부탁이 있어 낙원에서 우리에게 해줬던 것을 다시 해줬으면 해.

1000634309.english: Why? Surely you aren't saying that you can't do that anymore, are you?
1000634309.korean: 어째서지? 설마, 그런 짓은 이제 못 한다고 하는 그런 얘기는 아니겠지?

1000634310.english: Yes, Human... I promised the Commander that I wouldn't use it carelessly.
1000634310.korean: 네, 인간님... 사령관님과 함부로 쓰지 않겠다고 약속했어요.

1000634311.english: Besides, I think Night Angel's breasts are more beautiful just the way they are.
1000634311.korean: 게다가 저는 나이트앤젤님의 가슴은 있는 그대로가 더 아름답다고 생각해요.

1000634313.english: In this place that is not paradise, my abilities are nothing but a hologram. With a heart like that of a hologram...
1000634313.korean: 낙원이 아닌 이곳에서 제 능력은 홀로그램일 뿐이에요. 그런 홀로그램 가슴으로는...

1000634314.english: Wait! Everyone keeps talking about breasts... but I didn't say I came here because of breasts, okay?
1000634314.korean: 잠깐! 이놈이고 저놈이고 자꾸 가슴 가슴 하는데... 난 가슴 때문에 왔다고 말 안 했거든?

1000634315.english: Why on earth do you guys think I came here because of my breasts?
1000634315.korean: 당신들 대체 내가 왜 가슴 때문에 왔다고 생각하는 거지?

1000634319.english: So, are you asking me to put Captain May back into a hypnotic state?
1000634319.korean: 그러니까 메이 대장님을 다시 최면상태로 만들어 달라는 건가요?

1000634320.english: So to speak, that is. But it won't take long. If that little captain can just regain her haughty demeanor from Paradise, there is hope.
1000634320.korean: 말하자면 그렇지. 하지만 잠깐이면 돼. 잠깐 그 꼬마대장님이 낙원에서의 도도한 모습을 되찾는다면 희망이 있어.

1000634321.english: At that level, wouldn't it be better to ask your older brother?
1000634321.korean: 그 정도면 오라버니한테 부탁하는 게 더 좋지 않을까요?

1000634322.english: ... ... No. She is still the leader of our Doombringers. I cannot allow her to fall that low.
1000634322.korean: ... ... 안 돼. 그래도 우리 둠브링어의 대장이야. 거기까지 추락하는 건 내가 용납 못해.

1000634323.english: I was deeply moved by Night Angel. Your caring heart for others... it really touches my heart.
1000634323.korean: 나이트앤젤님께는 감동했어요. 남을 위하는 마음... 제 가슴을 울리는군요.

1000634325.english: No, but that is impossible. Paradise required special devices to draw out the desires within, not just to be seen.
1000634325.korean: 아뇨, 하지만 그건 불가능해요. 낙원은 단순히 보는 것뿐만이 아닌 마음속의 욕망을 이끌기 위해 특별한 장치들이 필요했어요.

1000634326.english: However, to prevent them from escaping to paradise any further, I destroyed all those devices.
1000634326.korean: 하지만 더 이상의 낙원으로 도망치지 않게, 그 장치들을 모두 부숴버렸답니다.

1000634327.english: Because there is a high risk that a device to change others' thoughts will be abused.
1000634327.korean: 남의 생각을 바꾸는 장치는 악용될 위험이 크니깐요.

1000634328.english: Why don't you just be honest with him?
1000634328.korean: 차라리 그분께 솔직히 얘기하는 건 어떨까요?

1000634329.english: ... Don't be ridiculous. Do you even realize how much I've told you?
1000634329.korean: ... 웃기지 마. 내가 얼마나 얘기했는지 알기나 해?

1000634330.english: I can't stand it like this! You abandoned me over there, didn't you? I'll go find you!
1000634330.korean: 이대로는 못 참아! 저기 버려둔 거지? 내가 찾아오겠어!

1000634332.english: Ah... has another sinner been born?

1000634333.english: Is this the device? No, no.

1000634334.english: So, is this it? This isn't it either.

1000634335.english: - Mery and Machina watched from afar as Night Angel searched for a machine in the ruins.
1000634335.korean: - 폐허 속에서 기계를 찾고 있는 나이트앤젤을 메리 와 마키나는 멀리서 지켜보고 있었다.

1000634336.english: Am I wrong again this time...?

1000634337.english: Do you remember, Mery? This was the place where numerous research labs were located.
1000634337.korean: 기억나시나요, 메리. 이곳은 수많은 연구소들이 있던 장소였죠.

1000634338.english: Yeah, I remember. I met Anne and Machina here too.
1000634338.korean: 응, 기억나. 앤도 마키나도 여기서 만났으니까.

1000634339.english: I was also surprised when Project X1225, who I had briefly worked with at the time, came back as Mery.
1000634339.korean: 그때 잠깐 함께했던 프로젝트 X1225번이 메리가 되어서 왔을 때는 저도 깜짝 놀랐어요.

1000634340.english: I remember wondering if she was really Dr. Ann’s daughter because she called her “Mom” at first. Heh.
1000634340.korean: 처음에 앤 박사님을 엄마라고 불러서 정말로 그녀의 딸인가 고민했었던 기억이 나네요. 후훗.

1000634341.english: Anne was just one of many researchers, but she made me. She gave me a name, taught me how to draw... So Anne is my mother.
1000634341.korean: 앤은 수많은 연구원 중에 하나였지만 날 만들어 줬어. 내게 이름을 주고, 그림을 가르쳐 줬어... 그러니 앤은 내 엄마야.

1000634345.english: Well, first of all, I need to atone. To the people of Orca, to the Bioroids in Paradise... and to you.
1000634345.korean: 글쎄요. 우선 속죄를 하려고 해요. 이곳 오르카호의 사람들에게, 낙원에 있던 바이오로이드들에게... 그리고 당신에게 저는 속죄를 해야 해요.

1000634346.english: But Machina did it with good intentions, right?
1000634346.korean: 그래도 마키나는 좋은 의도로 했던 일이잖아?

1000634347.english: Mery, good intentions don't always lead to good results. And I'm sorry to show you Anne in paradise.
1000634347.korean: 메리, 좋은 의도가 꼭 좋은 결과를 낳는 건 아니에요. 그리고 당신에게... 낙원에서 앤의 모습을 보여드려서 죄송해요.

1000634348.english: ...Because that was my desire. To meet Anne.
1000634348.korean: ... 그건 내 욕망이었으니까. 앤을 만나는 게.

1000634349.english: That was the first time I saw someone awaken from paradise. Mery, what did you hear from Anne then?
1000634349.korean: 그때 처음으로 낙원에서 깨어난 사람을 보았죠. 메리 그때 당신은 앤에게서 어떤 소리를 들었나요?

1000634350.english: Anne told me not to worry about other people and to live happily just the two of us.
1000634350.korean: 앤은 내게 다른 사람은 신경 쓰지 말고 둘이서만 행복하게 살자고 했어.

1000634351.english: There's no way my mom would say something like that, right? Hehe.
1000634351.korean: 엄마가 그런 소리를 할 리가 없잖아? 히히.

1000634352.english: ...I see. Dr. Anne also wanted to save all the Bioroids here.
1000634352.korean: ... 그렇군요. 앤 박사님도 이곳의 바이오로이드를 모두 구하고 싶어 하셨죠.

1000634353.english: That's what makes us similar. Hehe.

1000634354.english: What was Anne really like? Could you tell me, Mery?
1000634354.korean: 실제로 앤은 어땠나요? 제게 이야기해 주실 수 있을까요, 메리?

1000634356.english: In the distance, Night Angel was rummaging through the ruins, and Mery and Machina could be seen chattering.
1000634356.korean: - 저 멀리에 나이트앤젤이 폐허를 뒤지고 있었고, 메리와 마키나가 떠드는 모습이 보였다.

1000634358.english: Brother! What is that flower on your head?
1000634358.korean: 오라버니! 머리 위에 그 꽃은 뭔가요?

1000634359.english: Oh my, Ms. Lise... She was quite a sensitive person... I always thought she was really tough...
1000634359.korean: 어머, 리제씨가... 꽤 섬세하신 분이셨군요... 저는 그녀가 굉장히 터프하다고만 생각했는데...

1000634360.english: Commander, is she alright? I have been in Paradise for a long time, but I have never seen a desire like hers.
1000634360.korean: 사령관님, 그녀는 괜찮은가요? 제가 오랫동안 낙원에 있었지만, 그녀와 같은 욕망은 처음 보았어요.

1000634361.english: Although her expression is very rough, I think Lise is surprisingly soft-hearted.
1000634361.korean: - 표현은 굉장히 거칠지만 리제는 의외로 마음이 여린 편이라 생각한다.

1000634362.english: She came to see me a little while ago... I think she must have forgotten something.
1000634362.korean: 조금 전, 그녀가 제게 찾아왔었죠... 아마, 잊어버린 물건이 있던 거 같아요.

1000634364.english: - Did Night Angel leave something behind? Did she forget something precious...?
1000634364.korean: - 나이트앤젤이 잊어버린 물건? 무언가 소중한 물건이라도 잊은 것일까...

1000634365.english: Commander, do you know? In the past, this city was a large industrial city that amassed great wealth.
1000634365.korean: 사령관님 알고 계시나요? 예전 이 도시는 커다란 공업 도시로서 큰 부를 얻은 도시였어요.

1000634366.english: However, when the recession eventually hit, the city ended up in decline.
1000634366.korean: 하지만 이윽고 불황이 오자 도시는 쇠퇴하고 말았죠.

1000634367.english: As the city declined, people fell into despair. People become more despairing about having what they possess taken away than about having nothing to begin with.
1000634367.korean: 도시가 쇠퇴하자 사람들은 절망에 빠졌어요. 원래부터 아무것도 가지지 않은 것보다 가진 것을 빼앗기는 것에 더욱 절망하게 되죠.

1000634368.english: In this city, intoxicated only by past glory amidst high crime rates and polarization, a researcher named Ann was looking for hope.
1000634368.korean: 높은 범죄율과 양극화에 과거의 영광에만 취한 이 도시에서 앤이라는 한 연구원은 희망을 찾고 있었어요.

1000634369.english: She believed that unfulfilled desires led people to commit crimes. That idea of hers soon led to the birth of Mery and me.
1000634369.korean: 그녀는 해소하지 못한 욕망들이 사람들의 범죄를 일으킨다고 생각하였어요. 그런 그녀의 아이디어는 곧 저와 메리를 탄생시킬 수 있게 되었죠.

1000634370.english: We were born to give people hope.
1000634370.korean: 저흰 사람들에게 희망을 주기 위해 태어났어요.

1000634371.english: Yes, brother. Anne wanted to make this whole city happy again.
1000634371.korean: 네, 오라버니. 앤은 이 도시 전체를 다시 행복하게 만들고 싶어 했어요.

1000634372.english: It’s a dangerous thought... but Anne would have been different from me. Perhaps it’s a thought an ordinary person might have.
1000634372.korean: 위험한 생각이죠... 하지만 앤은 저와 달랐을 거예요. 어쩌면 평범한 사람이 가질법한 생각이에요.

1000634373.english: However, I tried to forcibly realize that in paradise.
1000634373.korean: 그렇지만 저는 낙원에서 강제로 그걸 실현하려고 했어요.

1000634374.english: That was my arrogance and stubbornness...

1000634377.english: Although the Commander has forgiven me, my wrongdoing does not disappear. To make a fresh start on the Orca, I must receive punishment befitting my crime.
1000634377.korean: 사령관님께서 용서해 주셨지만, 제 잘못은 사라지는 게 아니에요. 제가 오르카호에서 새롭게 시작하기 위해선 죄에 합당하는 처벌을 받아야 해요.

1000634378.english: For the Commander's sake, and for my own...

1000634380.english: The Iron Bugs are coming towards this place!

1000634381.english: Yes, I will take the Commander to the Orca just like this.

1000634383.korean: - 로크가 에키드나를 태운 채 이곳으로 날아왔다.

1000634384.english: Your Excellency the Commander! I see you were here.

1000634385.english: When Echidna threw the lithium battery, it collided with nearby machines, causing a massive explosion in the area. Drawn by the sound, the Iron Bugs came to this place.
1000634385.korean: 에키드나가 리튬 배터리를 집어던지자 근처의 기계들과 충돌하면서 일대의 큰 폭발이 일어났습니다. 그 소리에 이끌려 철충들이 이곳으로 오게 되었습니다.

1000634386.english: Are you saying it's my fault, you piece of scrap metal!
1000634386.korean: 내 잘못이란 말이냐, 이 고철 덩어리!

1000634387.english: Now is not the time for this. Leave this to us. You return to the Orca and I will leave the command to you.
1000634387.korean: 지금은 이럴 때가 아니군. 여긴 우리에게 맡겨라. 그대는 오르카호로 돌아가 지휘를 부탁하지.

1000634389.english: - We defeated all the Metal Parasite that came our way, but we also suffered losses. For example...
1000634389.korean: - 이곳으로 오던 철충들을 모두 쓰러뜨렸으나 우리 또한 피해를 입을 수밖에 없었다. 대표적으로는...

1000634390.english: This can't be happening... I prepared so much... and the theater collapsed!!
1000634390.korean: 이럴 수가... 그토록 준비했는데... 연극장이 부서지다니!!

1000634391.english: Hraesvelgr, don't be so discouraged. We too are heartbroken.
1000634391.korean: 흐레스벨그, 너무 낙담하지 말게나. 우리 또한 비통한 마음일세.

1000634392.english: I guess so... I'm sorry, both of you worked hard to prepare for your performance.
1000634392.korean: 그렇겠죠... 두 분 다 열심히 연기를 준비해 주셨는데, 죄송해요.

1000634393.english: A play, on the ground... no? I want to show it to the Lord.
1000634393.korean: 연극, 땅에선... 안 돼? 주공에게 보여주고, 싶어.

1000634394.english: No... then it wouldn't be visible to everyone, and even the productions would be broken...
1000634394.korean: 아뇨... 그래선 모든 인원에게 보이지 않고, 여러 연출들 마저 부서져 버렸으니...

1000634395.english: Commander, I'm afraid we'll have to postpone our performance.
1000634395.korean: 사령관님. 아쉽지만, 저희의 연극은 나중으로 미뤄야 할 것 같습니다.

1000634396.english: Yes, it's a shame, but operations don't always go as planned.
1000634396.korean: 네. 안타까운 마음은 있지만 작전이란 원래 마음대로 되지 않는 법이죠.

1000634397.english: I'll have to wait until next time...

1000634399.english: ...If you just prepare the stage, I can direct. You prepared like this, but... it's such a waste.
1000634399.korean: ... 무대만 준비해 주시면 연출은 가능해요. 이렇게 준비하셨는데 그건... 너무 아깝잖아요.

1000634400.english: But, with just the picture... surely not Machina-san's...

1000634401.english: Yes, it's definitely possible if Machina helps.
1000634401.korean: 네, 마키나가 도와준다면 분명 가능할 거예요.

1000634403.english: Machina, our power exists to make people happy. So, I think now is the time. Let's do it.
1000634403.korean: 마키나, 우리 능력은 사람들을 행복하게 하기 위해서 존재하는 거야. 그러니 지금이 그때라고 생각해. 하자.

1000634405.english: Commander, if you permit me, I would like to help them...
1000634405.korean: 사령관님, 허락해 주신다면 그녀들을 도와드리고 싶어요...

1000634406.english: Hmm... Given Ms. Machina's abilities, I'm sure it's possible. But we've only just been on the receiving end of her powers. I wonder if everyone will accept it...
1000634406.korean: 으음... 마키나씨의 능력이라면 분명 가능은 하겠죠. 그렇지만, 우린 그녀의 능력으로 당한 지 얼마 안 된 시점이에요. 모두가 받아들일까...

1000634407.english: I won't show up behind the scenes. Everything that happened was ultimately my fault, so can you hold me accountable?
1000634407.korean: 저는 무대의 뒤에서 모습을 드러내지 않을게요. 모든 일은 결국 저 때문에 일어난 것이니 제가 책임지게 해주실 수 있을까요?

1000634410.english: - Leaving the stage, not only the Orca crew but also those who had awakened from paradise gathered together and waited for the play.
1000634410.korean: - 무대를 놔둔 채 오르카호 대원들뿐만이 아니라 낙원에서 깨어난 이들까지 모두 모여 연극을 기다리고 있었다.

1000634411.english: - Soon, the curtains opened on the stage and two kunoichi appeared alongside the splendid lights.
1000634411.korean: - 이윽고, 무대 위로 커튼이 걷히고 화려한 조명과 함께 두 쿠노이치가 올라섰다.

1000634414.english: Kunoichi. Currently goes by the name Zero.
1000634414.korean: 쿠노이치. 현재는 제로라는 이름을 쓰고 있다.

1000634418.english: - When Zero threw a kunai at Kaen, Kaen took out her sword with a strange step and struck the kunai away.
1000634418.korean: - 제로가 카엔을 향해 쿠나이를 던지자 카엔은 묘한 발걸음으로 검을 꺼내 쿠나이를 쳐냈다.

1000634420.english: Why are you... using Murasaki-ryu? Reveal your identity!
1000634420.korean: 당신이... 어째서 무라사키류를 쓰는 거지? 정체를 밝혀라!

1000634422.english: Even if one person disappears, I don't know.

1000634424.english: - In the darkness, only the light of the two kunoichi's swords clashing flashed.
1000634424.korean: - 어둠 속에서 두 쿠노이치의 칼이 부딪치는 빛만이 번쩍였다.

1000634425.english: Here, let's raise the moonlight a little more...

1000634427.english: This is a stage prepared for you, Commander, so you should watch it properly.
1000634427.korean: 사령관님을 위해 준비한 무대인데 제대로 봐주어야죠.

1000634428.english: - Everything except the curtain and the stage were holograms, but the stage that Machina and Mery had created on the spot looked perfect on the outside.
1000634428.korean: - 커튼과 무대를 제외하고는 모두 홀로그램이지만 마키나와 메리가 즉석으로 만든 무대는 겉으로 보기엔 완벽해 보였다.

1000634429.english: This is the first time I've seen so many people gathered together with smiling faces.
1000634429.korean: 전 이렇게 많은 인원들이 웃는 얼굴로 모여있는 걸 처음 봐요.

1000634431.english: I said I would find a way to make everyone happy here, but it seems there are still many things I don't know.
1000634431.korean: 이곳에서 모두들 행복하게 할 방법을 찾겠다고 하였지만, 제겐 모르는 게 아직 많이 있는가 보군요.

1000634432.english: You are an opponent who cannot be put to words...
1000634432.korean: 당신은 말로 끝낼 수 없는 상대로군요...

1000634433.english: Well then, let me show you. The true Murasaki style!

1000634434.english: - It seems like the highlight of the play is approaching. I should probably go back to my seat.
1000634434.korean: - 슬슬 연극의 하이라이트가 다가오는 것 같다. 나도 자리로 돌아가야겠다.

1000634435.english: My sword... burns the wind... and cuts through lightning.
1000634435.korean: 내 칼은. 바람을.. 불태우고. 번개를.. 가른다.

1000634436.english: Oh, the brain of the god of thunder!

1000634437.english: The Incarnation of the Five Elements.

1000634438.english: - The secret arts of two kunoichi clash on stage...
1000634438.korean: - 두 쿠노이치의 오의가 무대 위에서 부딪히며...

1000634440.english: - The lightning and sparks of the two people set the curtain on the stage ablaze, and the stage was engulfed in flames.
1000634440.korean: - 두 사람의 번개와 불꽃이 무대 위의 커튼을 불태우고 무대는 불꽃으로 휩싸였다.

1000634441.english: Ma... Machina-san, is this a real hologram?
1000634441.korean: 마... 마키나씨 이건 혹시 리얼한 홀로그램일까요?

1000634442.english: No, I didn't see anything in the battle scenes...

1000634444.english: Hoot, Machina Shogun, you're incredibly talented. It feels like I'm engulfed in real flames.
1000634444.korean: 훗, 마키나 쇼군 엄청난 능력이군. 마치 진짜 불길에 휩싸인 느낌이야.

1000634447.english: - The two continued to fight on stage, oblivious to the flames. They were truly one... As expected, they were Densetsu's Bioroids.
1000634447.korean: - 두 사람은 불길을 신경 쓰지 않고 무대 위에서 계속 싸우고 있었다. 그야말로 혼연일체... 역시 덴세츠의 바이오로이드들이었다.

1000634448.english: Machina! We're in trouble. We need to withdraw the drones immediately.
1000634448.korean: 마키나! 큰일 났어. 어서 드론들을 철수 시켜야 해.

1000634449.english: Hahahahaha. Life is full of unexpected things, Mery.
1000634449.korean: 하하하하하. 인생이란 예기치 못한 일들이 벌어지는군요, 메리.

1000634450.english: Commander, do you remember what I said? Paradise is not someplace else, but where the Savior is.
1000634450.korean: 사령관님 제가 하신 말 기억나시나요? 낙원이란 다른 곳이 아닌 구세주가 있는 곳이 낙원이란걸.

1000634451.english: This place might really be paradise.

1000634452.english: Thank you so much for inviting me to paradise, Commander.
1000634452.korean: 저를 낙원에 초대해 주셔서 정말 고마워요, 사령관님.

1000634455.english: Now that I think about it, that's what happened...

1000634457.english: Was Hraesvelgr's original speech like this?

1000634459.english: I'll look forward to it, Zero.

1000634463.english: Wasn't Echidna in the building too?

1000634465.english: Echidna has been looking for us all along...

1000634471.english: No, that's just a Setting Machina made up.
1000634471.korean: 아니, 그건 마키나가 만든 설정일 뿐이야.

1000634475.english: If that's the request, I'll grant it, Roc.

1000634477.english: Go to Khan, who is standing alone in the distance.

1000634481.english: After all, does Khan want to see them?

1000634485.english: Anytime is fine. I'm your commander.

1000634489.english: You can raise your head, Phantom.

1000634491.english: What happened in paradise wasn't your fault, Phantom.
1000634491.korean: 낙원에서의 일은 네 잘못이 아니야, 팬텀.

1000634492.english: Actually, the reason I called you is...

1000634493.english: In paradise, you definitely wanted to be ALcute, right?
1000634493.korean: 낙원에서 너희는 분명 AL큐트가 되고 싶어 했지?

1000634501.english: Then it would be better for Phantom to drink both.
1000634501.korean: 그럼 팬텀이 두잔다 마시는 게 좋겠네.

1000634502.english: There's still one drink left, Phantom.

1000634508.english: I had something to think about.

1000634509.english: It's okay because Miho is watching over you.

1000634512.english: What do you want to discuss, Arsenal?

1000634515.english: Of course. Just tell me, Arsenal.

1000634519.english: What did you make me drink?

1000634523.english: Well, wouldn't it be better to be with Mery?

1000634531.english: Can you write down what you're holding in your hand right now?

1000634539.english: This is a gift that Lise gave me.

1000634540.english: Don't worry, Lise, it'll be okay.

1000634542.english: That's what Mery said about her mother.

1000634544.english: You want me to punish you?

1000634552.english: I came because I was worried.

1000634553.english: There's still a bit left until the highlight.

1000634554.english: You'll be seeing a lot of this in the future.
1000634554.korean: 앞으로 많이 볼 수 있을 거야.

1000634557.english: Let's have an interview with Phantom and Wraith.

1000634558.english: Kiss the back of Lise's hand.

1000634559.english: Should I have some time alone?

1000634562.english: Huh. You're also completely captivated by my charm? I understand. That's probably why you treated me like that back then.&nWell… you don’t seem to treat me that well…&nWhat's with all that consideration and etiquette? Hot. You're going to teach me properly this time? Oh, go ahead and do it. I'm not scared at all, right?&n
1000634562.korean: 흥. 너도 내 매력에 푹 빠져버린 거야? 이해해. 그러니까 예전에 나를 그렇게들 대우해준 거겠지.&n뭐어… 너는 날 그다지 대우해주는 것 같진 않지만…&n애초에 배려심이라느니 예의라느니 그런 게 다 뭐야? 핫. 이번엔 제대로 교육을 해주겠다고? 어, 얼마든지 해 봐. 하나도 안 무섭거든?

1000634564.english: ...I was foolish. My eyes were clouded by blind faith, and I did not see the grace that came down before my eyes. I have not seen true hope. This is a sin that cannot be forgiven, even by those who are the limbs of light, or rather, of the Savior.&nUntil the end of this life, I will fulfill the will of the Savior and repent even a little.
1000634564.korean: ...나는, 어리석었다. 맹목적인 믿음에 눈이 흐려져, 은혜롭게도 눈 앞에 강림하신&n진정한 희망을 보지 못했다. 이는 빛의, 아니 구원자의 수족으로써 결코 용서받을 수 없는 죄.&n이 한 목숨이 다할 때까지 구원자의 의지를 실현해 조금이나마 회개하겠다.

1000634566.english: ...This one was lonely. For decades, this one had not met with anyone. No... had chosen not to.&nYou. You have no idea how happy this one was when you reached out your hand.&nWhen you held this clumsy and willful one so tightly in your arms… Hehe, there would be no end if one were to list them all.&nThis one will tell you slowly from now on. Until you and this one return to the embrace of God.&n
1000634566.korean: ...외로웠다. 첩은 수십 년 동안, 누구와도 만나지 못했다. 아니... 만나지 않았지.&n그대여. 그대가 손을 내밀어 주었을 때, 첩이 얼마나 기뻤었는지… 그대는 모를거다.&n서툴고 억지만 부리는 첩을 그대가 꼭 안아주었을 때… 후후, 일일이 말하자면 끝이 없겠구나.&n앞으로 천천히 이야기 해주마. 그대와 내가, 신의 품으로 돌아갈 때까지.

1000634570.english: Let's turn it to the side.

1000634573.english: Xenox says he's sorry... He'll move out of the way in a second...

1000634575.english: Yeah. Genox worked hard, so let him take a break for a bit.
1000634575.korean: 응. 제녹스도 열심히 했으니까 잠깐 쉬게 해줘.

1000634578.english: - Now that we've crossed the sea and returned to our original base, is it safe for the time being...
1000634578.korean: - 일단 바다를 건너 원래 거점으로 돌아왔으니 당분간은 안전한가...

1000634579.english: - It is impossible to cover the entire eastern sea with air power alone, so let's leave this to Dragon's Fleet...
1000634579.korean: - 항공 전력으로 동쪽의 바다를 전부 커버하기는 불가능하니, 이건 용의 함대에게 맡기고...

1000634581.english: Constantia said we shouldn't disturb the commander while he's working.
1000634581.korean: 콘스탄챠가 사령관이 일할 때 방해하면 안 된댔어.

1000634584.english: - I caught the potted plant as it teetered and was about to fall, then sat Emily on my lap.
1000634584.korean: - 비틀거리며 쓰려지려는 화분을 붙잡은 뒤 에밀리를 무릎 위에 앉혔다.

1000634585.english: Emily, take a break with Jenox too.

1000634586.english: Yeah. Emily... did it a lot.

1000634588.english: - I thought it was about time my concentration started to wane, and sure enough. I held Emily, who was sitting on my lap and starting to doze off, and continued to review the documents.
1000634588.korean: - 슬슬 집중력이 떨어질 때가 됐다 싶었는데 역시나. 무릎에 앉아서 꾸벅꾸벅 졸기 시작하는 에밀리를 안고 계속해서 서류를 검토했다.

1000634589.english: For a while, only the sound of Emily's even breathing and Caen and Neodym quietly exchanging opinions echoed in the captain's quarters.
1000634589.korean: - 한동안 함장실에는 에밀리의 고른 숨소리와 카엔과 네오딤이 조곤조곤 의견을 나누는 소리만 울렸다.

1000634590.english: - To think you can get work done without any problems even in a situation like this...
1000634590.korean: - 이런 상황에서도 별 문제 없이 업무를 볼 수 있다니...

1000634591.english: Guys, I brought someone to help.

1000634593.english: I'm having a bit of a hard time. But I think it'll be different now.
1000634593.korean: 애 좀 먹고 있어. 그래도 이젠 다를걸?

1000634595.english: Right? Since we're in charge of the preparations, we're going to do it the way we're used to.
1000634595.korean: 그치? 이왕 우리가 준비를 맡은김에, 우리한테 익숙한 방식으로 할려구.

1000634596.english: - At Miho's words, I looked around the captain's quarters anew. The folding screens draped around exuded a strange atmosphere.
1000634596.korean: - 미호의 말에 새삼스레 함장실을 둘러보았다. 둘러쳐진 병풍이 묘한 분위기를 풍긴다.

1000634597.english: But we were struggling because we didn't know everything perfectly, and then ta-da!
1000634597.korean: 그런데 우리가 완벽하게 아는 건 아니라서 고생하고 있었는데, 이렇게 짠~

1000634599.english: Although I have not experienced it firsthand, I possess all the necessary knowledge.
1000634599.korean: 소첩이 직접 겪은 것은 아니지만, 필요한 지식은 전부 가지고 있습니다.

1000634601.english: - Since we have just returned near the base, it would be a good idea to prepare according to the culture of the country that used to be in this area.
1000634601.korean: - 마침 거점 근처로 돌아오기도 했으니, 예전에 이 근처에 있던 나라의 문화대로 준비하는 것도 좋겠지.

1000634603.english: - KeumRan, who has keen senses, must have heard me muttering to myself, but fortunately, she didn’t seem to mind much.
1000634603.korean: - 감각이 예민한 금란은 내 혼잣말을 들은 모양이지만, 다행히도 크게 신경쓰는 것 같진 않았다.

1000634604.english: We're docking soon, right? Let's get started in earnest.

1000634605.english: Huh? Neodym, but why are you wearing that outfit already?
1000634605.korean: 어? 네오딤, 근데 왜 벌써 그 옷 입고 있어?

1000634606.english: They said you have to get into the party spirit for the event.

1000634610.english: What about Miho? Is she going to keep wearing her combat uniform?
1000634610.korean: 미호는? 전투복, 계속 입고 있을 거야?

1000634612.english: - Miho let her words trail off and gave me a sly smile.
1000634612.korean: - 미호는 말꼬리를 늘이며 나를 보고 배시시 웃었다.

1000634613.english: It looks like it has arrived.

1000634614.english: - Just as KeumRan spoke, an announcement was made inside the ship announcing the docking.
1000634614.korean: - 금란의 말과 동시에 함내에 정박을 알리는 방송이 나왔다.

1000634615.english: Then, shall we go gather supplies? Can we go by ourselves?
1000634615.korean: 그럼 물자를 모으러 가볼까? 우리끼리 가도 되지?

1000634618.english: Yeah, yeah. Then see you later, Commander.

1000634619.english: The believers' faith in the Savior is growing deeper every day.
1000634619.korean: 신도들의 구원자에 대한 믿음이 하루가 다르게 깊어져 가는군요.

1000634620.english: Thanks to that, Veronica doesn't have much to do these days.
1000634620.korean: 덕분에 요즘은 베로니카가 할 일이 별로 없네요.

1000634621.english: It is desirable that I, as the Inquisitor, have nothing to do.
1000634621.korean: 이단심문관인 제가 할 일이 없는 것이 바람직한 것입니다.

1000634622.english: Thanks to you, I too was able to devote myself to my faith in the Savior.
1000634622.korean: 덕분에 저 또한 구원자님을 향한 신앙에 매진할 수 있게 되었습니다.

1000634623.english: Yes, the Savior will be happy too.

1000634624.english: Oh, how are the talent preparations going?

1000634625.english: We are accepting applicants and are in the process of issuing and distributing them.
1000634625.korean: 지원자를 받아 발행 및 배부를 진행하고 있습니다.

1000634626.english: Our church was also in charge of organizing and coordinating the prizes, excluding the special prizes.
1000634626.korean: 특별상을 제외한 상품 구성과 조정 또한 저희 교단에서 전담했습니다.

1000634627.english: Veronica, please keep a close eye on us. I fear that the believers may be blinded by wealth and their hearts may be clouded.
1000634627.korean: 베로니카가 잘 지켜봐 주세요. 혹시나 신도들이 재물에 눈이 멀어 마음에 어둠을 들일까 두렵습니다.

1000634629.english: Are they issuing pseudo-currency in the name of the church now?
1000634629.korean: 지금, 교단의 명의로 유사 화폐를 발행하는 건가?

1000634631.english: It is forbidden by the strict laws of the church.
1000634631.korean: 그것은 지엄한 교단의 율법으로 금지되어 있다.

1000634632.english: It is the will of the Savior, Saraqael.

1000634633.english: The Savior wants to bestow grace upon us in this new year of budding life.
1000634633.korean: 구원자께선 생명이 싹트는 새로운 한 해를 맞아 저희들에게 은혜를 베푸려고 하십니다.

1000634634.english: Why do you question the words of the solemn Savior?
1000634634.korean: 당신은, 어째서 지엄한 구원자의 말씀에 의문을 갖는 건가요?

1000634636.english: Yes... The Savior's words clearly take precedence over light-
1000634636.korean: 그래... 분명 구원자의 말은 빛보다 우선-

1000634638.english: It is our joy and the purpose of our existence to realize the will of the Savior in the world, Saraqael.
1000634638.korean: 구원자의 의지를 세상에 실현하는 것이야말로 저희의 기쁨이고 존재의의입니다, 사라카엘.

1000634639.english: To question it is irreversible disrespect, but it will be confusing soon after its descent, so I will overlook it this time.
1000634639.korean: 그것에 의문을 품는 것은 돌이킬 수 없는 불경이나, 강림한지 얼마 되지 않아 혼란스러울 터이니 이번에는 눈감아드리겠습니다.

1000634640.english: Please be careful not to say such things in front of other believers.
1000634640.korean: 혹시라도 다른 신도들 앞에서 그런 이야기를 입 밖에 내지 않도록 주의해주세요.

1000634642.english: ...I need some time to gather my thoughts.

1000634644.english: Is that okay? Saraqael might take some extreme action.
1000634644.korean: 괜찮겠습니까? 사라카엘님이라면 과격한 행동을 벌일 수도 있습니다.

1000634645.english: I've put the safety devices in place. I don't think anything will harm the savior.
1000634645.korean: 안전장치는 해두었어요. 구원자에게 해를 끼칠 일은 없겠죠.

1000634646.english: Even so, if it were known that the angels of the church, who should have the deepest faith of all, were questioning the Savior, the Savior's authority would fall to the ground.
1000634646.korean: 그렇다 할지라도, 누구보다도 믿음이 깊어야 할 교단의 천사가 구원자께 의문을 품는 것이 알려진다면 구원자님의 권위가 땅에 떨어질 것입니다.

1000634647.english: Such a situation must be prevented by force, but that is difficult when the opponent is Saraqael.
1000634647.korean: 그런 사태는 무력을 동원해서라도 막아야 하나, 상대가 사라카엘님이어서야 그것도 어렵습니다.

1000634648.english: ...We need to keep it as unknown as possible. And...

1000634649.english: This is a trial. If he overcomes this trial on his own, Saraqael’s faith will grow even stronger.
1000634649.korean: 이것은 시련입니다. 이 시련을 스스로 이겨낸다면, 사라카엘의 믿음은 더욱 깊어질테죠.

1000634650.english: Haha, then, as the sword of the church, half...

1000634653.english: Oh, it will be a great help to the Savior.
1000634653.korean: 구, 구원자에게 큰 힘이 되어줄 것입니다.

1000634655.english: The Savior did not forbid lust and passion.

1000634656.english: Don't worry, Azazel, it is not a sin to have affection for the Savior.
1000634656.korean: 아자젤님이 구원자께 애정을 품는 것은 죄가 되지 않으니, 걱정하지 마십시오.

1000634658.english: Still, please be careful in front of other believers. I fear this may tarnish the authority of the church.
1000634658.korean: 그래도 다른 신도들 앞에서는 주의해 주시길. 교단의 권위에 흠이 될까 두렵습니다.

1000634661.english: Wow... Azazel is truly an angel, ordering hamburgers for us.
1000634661.korean: 우와아... 저희를 위해서 햄버거를 발주해주시다니, 아자젤 님은 진짜 천사지 말임다.

1000634662.english: Don't be anxious about what will be served as side dishes during the New Year's service!
1000634662.korean: 새해 예배 때는 부식으로 뭐가 나올지 기대되지 말임다!

1000634664.english: ......Sergeant, just leave out some of the French fries-

1000634667.english: Oh, aren't you the new angel!

1000634668.english: I have a question for you. What happens inside the Orca?
1000634668.korean: 잠시 물어볼 것이 있다. 오르카 호 내부에서 일어나는-

1000634669.english: Well then, you've come to the right place! These brownies, they're a thing!
1000634669.korean: 그렇다면 제대로 찾으셨지 말임다! 이 브라우니, 그런거라면 모르는 게 없지 말임다!

1000634671.english: How long has it been since you attended a church service?

1000634672.english: Are you talking about religious events? It's been like that from the beginning until now.
1000634672.korean: 종교행사 말임까? 처음부터 지금까지 쭉이지 말임다.

1000634674.english: Was there ever a time when the worship content was different from today?
1000634674.korean: 예배 내용이 오늘과 다른 경우는 있었나?

1000634675.english: Well... that's not true. Sing a song, listen to Azazel's words...
1000634675.korean: 음... 그렇지는 않지 말임다. 노래 부르고, 아자젤 님 말씀을 듣고...

1000634676.english: The only thing that changes is the snacks that are served.

1000634677.english: I see... I guess I didn't defile the sacred place.

1000634678.english: What does Azazel say during worship?
1000634678.korean: 예배 때 아자젤은 무슨 말을 하지?

1000634679.english: Oh, the new angel wasn't here today.
1000634679.korean: 아, 새로오신 천사님은 오늘 없으셨지 말임다.

1000634680.english: It's always similar. She says that you should read passages from the thick book containing the doctrines of the sect and carry out the Commander's will in the same way.
1000634680.korean: 항상 비슷함다. 그... 교단의 교리가 적힌 두꺼운 책에 있는 구절을 읽으시고, 그것처럼 사령관 각하의 의지를 실현해야 한다고 하심다.

1000634683.english: There is no doubt about it.

1000634684.english: As expected... It's only natural, since the angel of the church has fallen.
1000634684.korean: 역시 그랬군... 교단의 천사가 타락했으니, 당연한 일인가.

1000634685.english: Are you talking about corruption?! Then wouldn't that be a big problem!

1000634686.english: But you must look fine on the outside...
1000634686.korean: 그래도 분명 겉으로는 멀쩡해 보이시지 말임다...

1000634687.english: The Savior's behavior is also strange.

1000634688.english: I don't know if Azazel corrupted the Savior or vice versa, but it's clear that darkness is encroaching upon this place.
1000634688.korean: 아자젤이 구원자를 타락시켰는지, 반대인지는 모르겠지만 어둠이 이곳을 잠식하고 있다는 건 확실해.
