1000634689.english: Is it possible that Azazel and the Savior have a secret meeting?
1000634689.korean: 혹시, 아자젤과 구원자가 밀회를 갖는 경우는 없나?

1000634692.english: Hehe, I guess you're a bit nervous since you're attending a religious event. You don't have to be...
1000634692.korean: 헤헷, 아무래도 종교 행사를 하시는 분이니 조금 신경쓰시는 것 같지 말임다. 안 그러셔도 되는데...

1000634693.english: Light... forgive my sister who is steeped in darkness.

1000634694.english: Clearly, the two are plotting to corrupt the entire church and eliminate all traces of light from this world.
1000634694.korean: 분명 그 둘은 교단 전체를 타락시켜 이 세상에서 빛의 흔적을 없애려고 모의하고 있을 것이다.

1000634696.english: Oh, that's not it. It's just a normal love relationship.
1000634696.korean: 아아, 그건 아님다. 그냥 평범한 애정관계지 말임다.

1000634698.english: Haha... Since the theme park incident last time, Azazel has fallen head over heels for the Commander.
1000634698.korean: 후후... 저번에 테마파크 사건 이후로 아자젤 님, 사령관님에게 홀딱 반하셨지 말임다.

1000634699.english: So this brownie helped a little. Oh, and here's a picture, would you like to see it? It's so vivid.
1000634699.korean: 그래서 이 브라우니가 살짝 도움도 드렸슴다. 아, 사진도 있는데 보시겠슴까? 아주 생생하게 찍힌검다.

1000634703.english: The angel of the church lusts after the savior...!

1000634706.english: I was going to tell you that I could prepare a new angel costume for you if you wanted...
1000634706.korean: 원하시면 새로 오신 천사님 의상도 준비해드린다고 말씀드리려했는데...

1000634707.english: Eight, I guess I have to chase after him now!

1000634708.english: Everything is sorted out over here...

1000634710.english: I should rest a little before doing it.

1000634711.english: Sigh, things have gotten so hectic because the Commander suddenly announced a New Year's event...
1000634711.korean: 에휴, 사령관님이 갑자기 새해 행사를 연다고 하시는 바람에 일이 너무 많아졌으니까요...

1000634712.english: Hehe, but since you prepared snacks for me, just like the Captain said, keep the nagging to a minimum— huh?
1000634712.korean: 헤헷, 그래도 절 위해서 간식을 챙겨주셨으니까, 대장님 말대로 잔소리는 적당히- 어라?

1000634713.english: Why is the chocolate bar wrapper... Ah!

1000634716.english: Ugh... It must be Alvis again! With Miss LRL!
1000634716.korean: 흑... 또 알비스 언니겠죠! LRL 양하고!

1000634717.english: Sob... I've been told... so many times... that I have to be frugal... *sob*
1000634717.korean: 흐엥... 아껴야 된, 다고... 몇 번, 이나... 흑...

1000634720.english: - Now that the work is finished, I decided to step aside so the crew could freely decorate the captain's cabin.
1000634720.korean: - 일도 끝났겠다, 대원들이 자유롭게 함장실을 꾸밀 수 있도록 자리를 비켜주기로 했다.

1000634721.english: I saw you earlier while coming to relieve Fenrir, and it looked like you were heading towards the warehouse.
1000634721.korean: 아까 펜리르 언니랑 교대하러 오면서 봤는데, 창고 쪽으로 가시는 것 같았어요.

1000634722.english: - All the members were excited after the surprise announcement of the New Year's event, but there were some who couldn't simply be happy about it...
1000634722.korean: - 새해 행사를 기습 발표하고 모든 대원들이 들떴지만, 마냥 좋아할수만은 없는 대원들이 있었으니...

1000634723.english: - The personnel in charge of supplies and the kitchen were like that. Andvari, in particular, who was in charge of managing supplies, had practically been living in the warehouse for the past few days.
1000634723.korean: - 보급과 주방을 담당한 인원들이 그러하다. 특히 보급품 관리를 전담하는 안드바리는 요 며칠간 창고에서 살다시피 하고 있었다.

1000634724.english: Hehe, are you trying to comfort me?

1000634725.english: - As I shrugged my shoulders and walked toward the warehouse, Snow Feather naturally followed me.
1000634725.korean: - 어깨를 으쓱하며 창고로 발걸음을 옮기자 스노우 페더가 자연스럽게 내게 따라붙었다.

1000634727.english: - Bioroids are born with all the necessary knowledge from the start, so they have no trouble performing their duties immediately.
1000634727.korean: - 바이오로이드는 처음부터 필요한 지식을 모두 갖고 태어나기 때문에 바로 업무를 수행하는데에 지장이 없다.

1000634728.english: - However, in cases like Snow Feather, who was born a long time ago and has never experienced humans, it may take time to adapt.
1000634728.korean: - 하지만 스노우 페더처럼 오래 전에 태어나서 인간을 겪어본 적이 없는 경우엔, 적응에 시간이 필요할 때도 있다.

1000634730.english: I heard that. I heard you got really scolded by Lilith.
1000634730.korean: 그건 들었어요. 리리스 언니한테 엄청 혼났다면서요?

1000634731.english: - We headed to the warehouse while chatting about this and that.
1000634731.korean: - 이런 저런 이야기를 나누며 창고로 향했다.

1000634733.english: - I opened the door, went inside, and found Andvari.
1000634733.korean: - 문을 열고 들어가서 안드바리의 모습을 찾았다.

1000634734.english: - The sound of someone sobbing can be heard from inside, where the light is on.
1000634734.korean: - 안쪽, 불이 켜진 곳에서 누군가의 흐느끼는 소리가 들려온다.

1000634735.english: This... looks like Miss Andvari. Is something wrong?
1000634735.korean: 이건... 안드바리 양 같은데요? 무슨 일이라도 있는 걸까요?

1000634736.english: - I headed towards the inside where the crying sound was coming from, along with Snow Feather, who was keeping watch over the surroundings.
1000634736.korean: - 주변을 경계하는 스노우 페더와 함께 울음소리가 들리는 안쪽으로 향했다.

1000634739.english: - I examined Andvari, who had run over and thrown herself into my arms just in case, but she didn't seem to have any injuries.
1000634739.korean: - 혹시나 싶어 달려와 안기는 안드바리를 이리저리 살펴보았지만 딱히 다친 곳은 없어보였다.

1000634742.english: - Chocolate bar wrappers and empty tuna cans were scattered haphazardly on the floor.
1000634742.korean: - 바닥엔 초코바 포장지와 빈 참치캔이 어지러이 흩어져 있었다.

1000634743.english: - You mean Alvis and LRL again? One tap on the head wasn't enough, I guess.
1000634743.korean: - 설마 또 알비스와 LRL인가? 꿀밤 한 대로는 부족했나 보군.

1000634744.english: *Sob*... Right now... I need to be more careful...

1000634747.english: - Someone staggered out of the shadows and collapsed in front of Snow Feather, who was ready for battle.
1000634747.korean: - 그늘 속에서 비틀비틀 걸어나온 누군가는 전투 태세를 갖춘 스노우 페더 앞에서 풀썩 쓰러져 버렸다.

1000634748.english: It's my first time seeing your face, and there's no recognition number.
1000634748.korean: 처음 보는 얼굴에, 인식 번호도 없어요.

1000634750.english: - After the battle with Omega, the anti-Bioroid border was greatly strengthened.
1000634750.korean: - 오메가와의 일전 후, 대 바이오로이드 경계가 대폭 강화됐다.

1000634751.english: - We had the Bioroids we were supposed to rescue undergo a thorough examination under the doctor's supervision, and we had also strengthened the Orca's own security posture, but they managed to break through that...
1000634751.korean: - 구호하는 바이오로이드에 대해서도 닥터의 주관하에 철저한 검사를 거치게 하고, 오르카 호 자체의 경계태세도 강화했는데 그걸 뚫고 들어오다니...

1000634754.english: This one... has no intention of fighting...

1000634757.english: - At those words, Snow Feather, who had been blocking the way, turned around slightly.
1000634757.korean: - 그 말에 앞을 막아선 스노우 페더가 살짝 뒤를 돌아보았다.

1000634758.english: - As I nodded, Snow Feather took out a bottle of water and threw it to me.
1000634758.korean: - 내가 고개를 끄덕이자 스노우 페더가 보관된 식수 한 병을 꺼내 던져주었다.

1000634760.english: - The unidentified Bioroid, who had been hit in the head by a plastic bottle, without even the strength to raise its arms, hurriedly grabbed the rolling bottle and opened the lid.
1000634760.korean: - 팔을 들 힘도 없는지 페트병에 머리를 얻어맞은 정체불명의 바이오로이드는 굴러가는 병을 황급히 붙잡아 뚜껑을 열었다.

1000634762.english: Hwaaah... I, I think I'll live...

1000634764.english: ...I understand. I can't just rashly approach someone who suddenly appears...
1000634764.korean: ...이해한다. 갑자기 나타난 자에게 섣불리 접근할 수는 없겠지...

1000634765.english: The introduction comes late. This one is Hirume of Cheonhyang.

1000634766.english: I'll be staying on this ship for a while... Ah...

1000634767.english: - Hirume, who had been staggering, soon collapsed to the floor.
1000634767.korean: - 비틀거리던 히루메는 이내 바닥에 털썩 주저앉았다.

1000634770.english: Meow~ It's my first time seeing your face, but you've already taken care of it with your master's thing~?
1000634770.korean: 냐앙~ 처음 보는 얼굴인데, 벌써 주인님의 그.걸.로. 해치워버리신 건가요~?

1000634771.english: The detailed scan results show that there is only one biological response, so the warehouse is being sealed off from the outside.
1000634771.korean: 정밀 스캔 결과 생체 반응이 쟤 하나 뿐이라, 외부에서 창고를 봉쇄중이에요.

1000634772.english: One Poi is enough for the opponent... Yo!

1000634774.english: - Poi, who had approached in an instant, placed her claws on Hirume's neck.
1000634774.korean: - 순식간에 접근한 포이가 손톱을 히루메의 목에 가져다 댔다.

1000634775.english: What do you want to do? Would you like to question her yourself?

1000634776.english: It's a message from my sister. She says this warehouse is the only place that's completely safe right now. You should stay here for the time being.
1000634776.korean: 언니의 연락이에요. 지금 완전히 안전이 확보된 건 이 창고뿐이라고 해요. 당분간은 여기 계시는게 좋겠어요.

1000634777.english: - Hirume, who is trembling while being subdued by Poi, does not look dangerous.
1000634777.korean: - 포이에게 제압당한 채 벌벌 떨고 있는 히루메는 위험해 보이진 않는다.

1000634778.english: - However, as long as the opponent uses brainwashing and other methods, we need to be careful.
1000634778.korean: - 하지만 상대가 세뇌 등의 수법을 이용하는 이상, 조심할 필요가 있다.

1000634780.english: It doesn't matter if you don't say anything.

1000634781.english: The Master can make you very honest in just a few minutes... so maybe it would be better to keep your mouth shut and go to heaven~?
1000634781.korean: 주인님은 몇 분이면 너를 아~주 솔직하게 만들어줄 수 있으니까... 오히려 입을 다물고 천국으로 가는 게 좋을지도~?

1000634784.english: What are you planning to do to your wife and concubine...?
1000634784.korean: 처, 첩에게 무슨 짓을 하려는 것이냐...?

1000634785.english: - In a situation where I didn't know if she was an enemy or not, I didn't intend to do anything bad, but Hirume swallowed hard and opened her mouth, as if the threat had worked.
1000634785.korean: - 적인지 아닌지 모르는 상황에서 심한 짓을 할 생각은 없지만, 공갈이 제대로 먹혀들었는지 침을 꿀꺽 삼킨 히루메가 입을 열었다.

1000634786.english: ...When this submarine was anchored... d, came in.
1000634786.korean: ...이 잠수함이 정박해 있을 때... 드, 들어왔다.

1000634787.english: - Apparently, a system has been added that sounds an alarm when an unauthorized biometric response is detected...?
1000634787.korean: - 분명 인증되지 않은 생체 반응이 침입하면 경보가 울리는 시스템이 증설되었었는데...?

1000634788.english: Mom, I don't know. The concubine just... I don't know...

1000634789.english: I just came in without anyone seeing me.

1000634790.english: - I think I know why Hirume didn't want to talk.
1000634790.korean: - 히루메가 말을 하지 않으려고 했던 이유를 알 것 같다.

1000634791.english: -Judging by the way she speaks, she seems to be a very proud person... She must have really hated admitting that she snuck in like a thief.
1000634791.korean: -말투도 그렇고 굉장히 프라이드가 높은 성격인 모양인데... 도둑처럼 몰래 들어왔다는 것을 어지간히도 말하기 싫었던 거겠지.

1000634792.english: - Apparently, the security system was expanded a few months ago, after the incident in Alaska. So...
1000634792.korean: - 분명 경비 시스템을 증설한 건 몇 달 전, 알래스카에서의 일전 이후. 그렇다면...

1000634793.english: In the snow-covered land of Alaska.

1000634794.english: That, and... there's no need to say "secretly", right? It's embarrassing to hear.
1000634794.korean: 그, 그리고... 굳이 몰래라고는 할 필요 없지 않느냐. 듣기 민망하구나.

1000634796.english: - At that time, the security system had not been expanded, and the Orca's security was weakened due to the fierce fighting.
1000634796.korean: - 그 당시는 경비 시스템을 증설하기 전이었고, 격전을 벌이느라 오르카 호의 경계가 약해져있었다.

1000634797.english: - Since there were a series of events that would have stirred up Orca since then, it seems like it might not have been discovered.
1000634797.korean: - 그 이후로도 오르카가 들썩일만한 사건의 연속이었으니, 들키지 않을 수도 있었겠군.

1000634799.english: - Hirume's gaze, wandering around with nowhere to go, stopped at the supplies scattered on the floor.
1000634799.korean: - 갈 곳을 잃고 맴돌던 히루메의 시선이 바닥에 흩어져있는 보급품 이었던 것에서 멈췄다.

1000634802.english: Because of you... oh, how much I...

1000634803.english: Oh, don't cry. I'll make up for what the concubine ate somehow.
1000634803.korean: 우, 울지 말거라. 첩이 먹은 것은 어떻게든 벌충해주마.

1000634804.english: Master, the ship's safety has been secured. They say there's nothing unusual.
1000634804.korean: 주인님, 함내 안전 확보가 끝났어요. 이상없다고해요.

1000634805.english: - Snow Feather announced the end of the situation, leaving Hirume at a loss as she watched Andvari start to cry again.
1000634805.korean: - 다시 울먹이기 시작하는 안드바리를 보고 어쩔줄 몰라하는 히루메를 두고, 스노우 페더가 상황 종료를 알렸다.

1000634806.english: What are you going to do with this kid? Will she go to heaven?
1000634806.korean: 얘는 어떻게 하실 거예요? 역시 천.국.행~?

1000634807.english: Y-you. What kind of examination did you intend to make this one undergo...?
1000634807.korean: 그, 그대. 첩에게 무슨 검사를 받게 할 생각이더냐...?

1000634808.english: - I picked up Andvari, who was crying pitifully again, and comforted the frozen Hirume.
1000634808.korean: - 얼어붙은 히루메를 안심시키며 다시 서럽게 우는 안드바리를 안아들었다.

1000634810.english: - The crew members came and took Hirume away, and I carried Andvari back to the captain's quarters.
1000634810.korean: - 대원들이 와서 히루메를 데려가고, 나는 안드바리를 안아 함장실로 돌아왔다.

1000634811.english: *Sniff*... I really need to be frugal right now, especially... *Sob*... If you hold a New Year's event or something...
1000634811.korean: 훌쩍... 지금은, 특히 더 아껴야하는데... 흑... 새해 행사 같은 걸 여시면...

1000634812.english: - Just when it seemed to subside for a moment, Andvari's sorrow began to well up again.
1000634812.korean: - 잠시 잦아드나 싶더니, 안드바리의 설움이 다시 북받치기 시작했다.

1000634813.english: - It’s probably better to just call Leona than for me to try to comfort her clumsily.
1000634813.korean: - 내가 서툴게 달래는 것 보다는 레오나를 부르는게 확실하겠지.

1000634814.english: - I managed to coax and persuade Andvari into summoning Leona.
1000634814.korean: - 어떻게든 안드바리를 어르고 달래며 레오나를 호출했다.

1000634817.english: Why are you making the child cry?

1000634818.english: - Wait, do I have a little bit of a stake too...?

1000634819.english: - Leona carefully wiped away the tear stains from Andvari, who had fallen asleep in my arms exhausted from crying.
1000634819.korean: - 레오나는 울다 지쳐 내 품에서 잠든 안드바리의 눈물 자국을 조심스레 닦아주었다.

1000634820.english: Give it to me. Put her to sleep first, and I'll comfort her when she wakes up.
1000634820.korean: 이리 줘. 일단 재우고, 깨면 내가 달랠게.

1000634821.english: - Holding Andvari in her arms, Leona looked down at her desk, which was piled high with work.
1000634821.korean: - 안드바리를 안아든 레오나가 일감이 가득한 책상을 내려다 보았다.

1000634823.english: Once you finish that, something else comes up right away.
1000634823.korean: 그거 다하면 바로 다른 일이 생기잖아.

1000634824.english: - Thanks to suddenly holding an unplanned New Year's event before going into full-scale operation, the workload increased dramatically.
1000634824.korean: - 본격적으로 작전행동에 들어가기 전에 계획에 없던 신년 행사를 갑자기 연 덕분에 일감은 신나게 늘어났다.

1000634825.english: - Still, it has to be now, so I have no choice. It is a grave dug by the self.
1000634825.korean: - 그래도 지금 이 때가 아니면 안되니까 어쩔 수 없지. 스스로 판 무덤이다.

1000634826.english: Don't push yourself too hard. You can't collapse again.
1000634826.korean: 너무 무리하진 마. 또 쓰러지면 안되잖아.

1000634827.english: ......Because we have nothing but the commander.

1000634828.english: - When I smiled to reassure her, Leona gave me a faint smile in return.
1000634828.korean: - 안심시키려 웃어보이자 레오나도 내게 희미한 미소를 돌려주었다.

1000634830.english: - Just as Leona seemed to lean forward slightly, soft lips touched my cheek.
1000634830.korean: - 레오나가 몸을 살짝 숙이는가 싶더니, 부드러운 입술이 볼에 닿았다.

1000634831.english: You remember you were supposed to come to our accommodation today, right?
1000634831.korean: 오늘... 우리 숙소 오기로 한 거, 기억하고 있지?

1000634832.english: Don't come too late. I'll be waiting with my sisters.
1000634832.korean: 너무 늦지 않게 와. 자매들이랑 같이 기다리고 있을게.

1000634833.english: - Leaving behind some cautious words, Leona carried Andvari back.
1000634833.korean: - 조심스러운 말을 남긴채 레오나는 안드바리를 안고 돌아갔다.

1000634834.english: - "I guess I'll have to try and soothe her somehow." She continued speaking while giving Alvis a pat, a special remedy that works wonders for her too.
1000634834.korean: - 내가 어떻게든 달래봐야겠군. 알비스에게도 특효인 부둥부둥을 해주며 말을 이었다.

1000634836.english: With my talents... things to eat, and also...

1000634837.english: You're going to... share it, aren't you...

1000634838.english: - I guess Leona didn't tell Andvari. Even so, I can't very well tell Andvari that I put myself up as a prize...
1000634838.korean: - 안드바리한테는 레오나가 알려주지 않았나 보군. 아무리 그래도 안드바리에게 나를 상품으로 걸었다고 말 할 수는 없겠지...

1000634841.english: - I gently wiped the tears from Andvari's face and blew her nose for her.
1000634841.korean: - 눈물 범벅이 된 안드바리의 얼굴을 조심스레 닦아주고, 코까지 풀어주었다.

1000634842.english: - When I brought up the reason I had originally gone to see Andvari, her eyes widened in surprise.
1000634842.korean: - 원래 안드바리를 찾아간 이유였던 것을 꺼내자 안드바리의 눈이 휘둥그레졌다.
